analysis_summary.zh:
【叙事校验】当前市场处于熊市环境（1D RSI均低于45），但4小时级别呈现中性震荡。宏观上，VIX恐慌指数升至31.05（极端恐慌），美元走强（DXY 100.15），风险偏好受压。价格走势与新闻无明显新驱动，属于动能衰竭阶段。
【决策依据详情】SOL Qlib排名第一（分数0.0005），但RSI 34.38超卖，ADX 43.0显示强趋势，鲸鱼代币流向为负（-651,843.4 SOL充币抛售），稳定币流出（$-219,856），形成数据冲突。ETH和BTC的爆仓多空比极高（6.15和4.44），显示多头受压显著。
【痛苦交易】基于爆仓数据：SOL多头爆仓$1,104,941 vs 空头$21,373（多空比51.70），ETH多头爆仓$7,275,759 vs 空头$1,183,759（多空比6.15），BTC多头爆仓$5,969,873 vs 空头$1,345,675（多空比4.44）。持仓L/S比显示大户账户数多空比偏高（SOL 1.74，ETH 1.57，BTC 1.34），但持仓量多空比偏低（SOL 0.84，ETH 0.87，BTC 0.93），表明散户多头拥挤，面临强制平仓风险。
【剧本选择】选择MEAN_REVERSION剧本，因为技术指标（RSI超卖）与鲸鱼流向（抛售）冲突，且多头拥挤（高爆仓多空比），价格可能短期反弹但缺乏持续上涨动力，适合逆势交易。
analysis_summary.en:
Narrative Synthesis: Market is in bearish regime (1D RSI all below 45) but neutral on 4H. Macro shows VIX at 31.05 (extreme panic), DXY strong at 100.15, risk-off sentiment. Price action lacks new drivers, indicating momentum exhaustion.
Decision Details: SOL ranks top in Qlib (score 0.0005) but RSI 34.38 oversold, ADX 43.0 strong trend, whale token flow negative (-651,843.4 SOL to exchange), stablecoin outflow ($-219,856), creating data divergence. ETH and BTC have high liquidation ratios (6.15 and 4.44), showing long pressure.
Pain Trade: Liquidation data: SOL long liq $1,104,941 vs short $21,373 (ratio 51.70), ETH long $7,275,759 vs short $1,183,759 (ratio 6.15), BTC long $5,969,873 vs short $1,345,675 (ratio 4.44). Whale L/S ratios show high account long bias (SOL 1.74, ETH 1.57, BTC 1.34) but low position bias (SOL 0.84, ETH 0.87, BTC 0.93), indicating crowded retail longs at risk of forced exit.
Scenario Selection: Choose MEAN_REVERSION playbook due to conflict between technicals (oversold RSI) and whale flow (selling), plus crowded longs (high liq ratios), suggesting potential short-term bounce but lack of sustained upside, suitable for contrarian trade.

red_team_audit.zh: 【强制要求全中文】如果判断错误，最可能的反向理由是：鲸鱼抛售可能持续（代币流向负值），导致价格进一步下跌而非反弹。数据支撑：SOL和ETH的鲸鱼代币流向24h和7d均为负（充币抛售），稳定币流出，显示机构看跌。此外，宏观风险（VIX高、美元强）可能压制整体市场，使反弹失败。Qlib分数显示SOL相对强势，可能推动价格上行，忽略超卖信号。
red_team_audit.en: Forced Contra-Argument: If thesis is wrong, most likely reason is whale selling persists (negative token flow), causing further price decline instead of bounce. Supporting data: SOL and ETH whale token flow negative for 24h and 7d (to exchange), stablecoin outflow, indicating institutional bearishness. Plus, macro risks (high VIX, strong DXY) may suppress overall market, causing bounce to fail. Qlib score shows SOL relative strength, potentially driving price up and ignoring oversold signals.

contrary_signal_check.zh: 【要求全中文】最明显的冲突信号：SOL的Qlib分数最高（0.0005），排名第一，显示相对强势，可能推动上涨。解释：Qlib分数基于历史数据，但当前鲸鱼流向和爆仓数据显示短期抛压，技术超卖可能先触发反弹再回归下跌，因此均值回归剧本仍适用，但需谨慎管理风险。
contrary_signal_check.en: List the most significant contrary signal or risk point and justify why it doesn't invalidate the trade: SOL has highest Qlib score (0.0005), rank 1, indicating relative strength that could drive upside. Justification: Qlib score is historical-based, but current whale flow and liquidation data show short-term selling pressure, and oversold conditions may trigger bounce before resuming downtrend, so mean reversion playbook still applies with careful risk management.

SMA deviation: SOL -6.19%, ETH -4.27%, BTC -3.32%, all oversold.

Whale Net Inflow/Outflow: SOL token outflow -651,843.4 SOL (selling), stablecoin outflow $-219,856; ETH token outflow -1,091,999.2 ETH (selling), stablecoin outflow $-336,669. quantitative_analysis.zh: 【全中文】Qlib排名靠前的币种：SOL（分数0.0005，排名1），BNB（0.0004，排名2），DOGE（0.0004，排名3）。SOL分数显著性高，但与其他数据冲突。量价偏差：SOL资金费率Z-Score 46.46%（偏高），显示情绪分歧；DOGE OI变化3.48%，持仓增加。

Z-Score deviations: SOL funding Z-Score 46.46% (high), indicating sentiment divergence; DOGE OI change 3.48%, increasing positions.

regime_safety.zh: 【全中文必填】最终判读：均值回归 (SAFE_MR)。依据：价格超卖（RSI低于35，偏离SMA50负值），爆仓多空比极高显示多头痛苦，鲸鱼流向负值但技术面可能反弹，适合逆势交易，风险可控。

analysis_summary.zh:
【叙事校验】当前市场处于熊市环境（BTC RSI_1D=41.6，价格低于SMA50），但宏观背景中性（美联储利率稳定，日元走弱显示风险偏好）。价格走势与鲸鱼数据出现明显分歧：ETH和SOL的鲸鱼代币流向显示净流出（抛售），但价格仅小幅下跌，RSI处于超卖区域（ETH RSI_14=37.1，SOL RSI_14=34.7），且爆仓多空比极高（ETH=3.90，SOL=4.10），表明散户多头正在被强制平仓，形成痛苦交易。这暗示抛压可能衰竭，存在隐藏积累可能。
【决策依据详情】选择SOL和DOGE作为主要关注对象，因为Qlib排名前二（分数0.0041和0.004），技术面超卖（SOL RSI_14=34.61，DOGE RSI_14=42.3），且爆仓多空比显示多头受压（SOL=4.10，DOGE=0.88）。ETH虽Qlib排名垫底（-0.0152），但鲸鱼流出与价格韧性形成背离，需谨慎监控。
【痛苦交易】基于爆仓数据，ETH、SOL、BTC的多头正在遭受强平痛苦（爆仓多空比均>3），而空头相对安全。持仓L/S比显示大户账户数多空比偏高（ETH=1.57，SOL=1.69，DOGE=1.62），但持仓量多空比偏低（均<1），表明散户多头拥挤，机构可能反向布局。
【剧本选择】当前微观结构支持均值回归（MEAN_REVERSION）剧本：价格超卖、多头强平、鲸鱼流出但价格持稳，这可能是机构在低位吸筹的迹象。拒绝趋势跟随，因为整体趋势熊市且动量不足（avg_momentum_12=-0.0019）。拒绝轧空剧本，因为空头并未明显拥挤（持仓量多空比<1）。
analysis_summary.en:
Narrative Synthesis: Market is in bearish regime (BTC RSI_1D=41.6, price below SMA50), but macro context is neutral (Fed rate stable, JPY weakness indicates risk-on). Price action diverges from whale data: ETH and SOL show net token outflow (selling), yet prices decline modestly with oversold RSI (ETH RSI_14=37.1, SOL RSI_14=34.7) and extreme liquidation ratios (ETH=3.90, SOL=4.10), indicating retail longs are being liquidated, creating a pain trade. This suggests selling pressure may be exhausting, with potential hidden accumulation.
Decision Details: Focus on SOL and DOGE due to top Qlib ranks (scores 0.0041 and 0.004), oversold conditions (SOL RSI_14=34.61, DOGE RSI_14=42.3), and liquidation skew (SOL=4.10, DOGE=0.88). ETH ranks lowest in Qlib (-0.0152) but shows divergence between whale outflow and price resilience, warranting caution.
Pain Trade: Based on liquidation data, longs in ETH, SOL, BTC are suffering (liquidation ratios >3), while shorts are relatively safe. L/S ratios show high account long bias (ETH=1.57, SOL=1.69, DOGE=1.62) but low position bias (all <1), indicating crowded retail longs and potential institutional counter-positioning.
Scenario Selection: Microstructure supports mean reversion (MEAN_REVERSION) play: oversold prices, long liquidations, whale outflow with price stability, suggesting institutional accumulation at lows. Reject trend-following due to bearish trend and weak momentum (avg_momentum_12=-0.0019). Reject squeeze play as shorts are not crowded (position bias <1).

red_team_audit.zh: 【强制要求全中文】如果判断错误，最可能的反向理由是：鲸鱼流出是真实的抛售信号而非吸筹，价格可能继续下跌突破关键支撑（如SOL $80，ETH $1950），触发更多多头止损。数据支撑：ETH和SOL的鲸鱼评分均为负（24h=-0.02和-0.35），稳定币也在流出（ETH $-336,669，SOL $-137,933），表明资金离场意愿强。此外，宏观恐慌指数VIX高达31.05（极端恐慌上升），可能引发全市场抛售，抵消超卖反弹。
red_team_audit.en: Forced Contra-Argument: If the thesis is WRONG, the most likely reason is that whale outflow is genuine selling rather than accumulation, and prices could break key supports (e.g., SOL $80, ETH $1950), triggering more long stops. Supporting data: ETH and SOL whale sentiment scores are negative (24h=-0.02 and -0.35), stablecoin flow is out (ETH $-336,669, SOL $-137,933), indicating capital flight. Additionally, macro panic (VIX=31.05, extreme rising) could trigger broad sell-off, overriding oversold bounce.

contrary_signal_check.en: List the most significant contrary signal or risk point and justify why it doesn't invalidate the trade: 1) Whale token flow is negative (ETH -1,136,524.2 ETH, SOL -351,125.8 SOL), typically bearish; 2) Overall market regime is bearish (all assets below SMA50). Justification: Prices show resilience despite outflow, indicating buying support; oversold RSI and extreme liquidation ratios suggest selling is overdone, increasing reversal odds; Qlib top coins (SOL, DOGE) provide relative strength support.

regime_safety.zh: 【全中文必填】最终判读：鲸鱼吸筹（WHALE_ACCUMULATION）。依据：价格超卖（RSI<40，偏离SMA50>3%），鲸鱼流出但价格持稳（下影线比率高），爆仓多空比显示多头被清洗，Qlib高分币种相对强势，符合机构在痛苦交易中低位积累的特征。

Justification: Prices oversold (RSI<40, deviation from SMA50>3%), whale outflow with price resilience (high lower wick ratios), liquidation ratios show longs flushed, Qlib top coins show relative strength, fitting institutional accumulation during pain trade.

analysis_summary.zh:
[叙事校验]：当前市场处于熊市环境（所有资产价格低于SMA50），但宏观背景显示日元疲软（风险偏好）与VIX恐慌指数上升（风险厌恶）并存，形成情绪分歧。价格走势与鲸鱼行为出现明显背离：ETH和SOL的鲸鱼代币流向显示净流入交易所（抛售），但价格并未大幅下跌，暗示存在隐藏的机构承接或散户抛压被吸收。
[决策依据详情]：DOGE的Qlib分数最高（0.0051），但RSI（44.63）和动量（0.0064）仅略偏中性，且爆仓多空比（0.47）显示空头爆仓更多，可能预示空头挤压机会。ETH的鲸鱼代币流向为-1,136,732.5 ETH（抛售），但价格在$2002附近持稳，RSI（38.8）处于超卖区域，ADX（31.1）显示趋势强度中等，形成数据矛盾。
[痛苦交易]：基于爆仓多空比，BTC（1.45）、ETH（1.18）、SOL（1.86）的多头爆仓均高于空头，表明多头仓位正承受强平痛苦，存在挤压风险；而DOGE（0.47）和BNB（0.37）的空头爆仓更高，空头可能被挤压。持仓L/S比显示DOGE（账户数比1.61）和SOL（账户数比1.70）的多头账户拥挤，但DOGE的持仓量比（0.73）偏低，暗示散户多头可能过度杠杆化。
[剧本选择]：选择MICROSTRUCTURE_SQUEEZE剧本，因为当前数据揭示多个资产的爆仓多空比与持仓拥挤度不一致，例如DOGE的空头爆仓高但多头账户拥挤，可能触发空头轧空；同时ETH的鲸鱼抛售与价格韧性形成背离，适合捕捉潜在反转。
analysis_summary.en:
[Narrative Validation]: The market is in a bearish regime (all assets below SMA50), but macro context shows mixed signals: Yen weakness (risk-on) vs VIX spike (risk-off), creating sentiment divergence. Price action diverges from whale behavior: ETH and SOL show net token inflow to exchanges (selling), yet prices haven't collapsed, suggesting hidden accumulation or retail selling being absorbed.
[Decision Details]: DOGE has the highest Qlib score (0.0051), but RSI (44.63) and momentum (0.0064) are only mildly neutral, and liquidation long/short ratio (0.47) indicates more short liquidations, potentially signaling a short squeeze. ETH whale token flow is -1,136,732.5 ETH (selling), but price holds near $2002 with RSI (38.8) oversold and ADX (31.1) moderate, creating data conflict.
[Pain Trade]: Based on liquidation ratios, BTC (1.45), ETH (1.18), and SOL (1.86) have higher long liquidations, indicating long positions are under pressure and at risk of a squeeze; DOGE (0.47) and BNB (0.37) have higher short liquidations, suggesting shorts may be squeezed. L/S ratios show DOGE (account ratio 1.61) and SOL (account ratio 1.70) are crowded with long accounts, but DOGE's position ratio (0.73) is low, hinting at over-leveraged retail longs.
[Scenario Selection]: Choose MICROSTRUCTURE_SQUEEZE playbook, as current data reveals mismatches between liquidation ratios and crowding across assets, e.g., DOGE's high short liquidations vs crowded long accounts could trigger a short squeeze; meanwhile, ETH's whale selling vs price resilience offers a divergence play for potential reversal.

red_team_audit.zh: 如果我的判断错误，最可能的反向理由是：1) 鲸鱼抛售（如ETH和SOL的负向代币流向）可能持续，导致价格最终跌破关键支撑，而非当前显示的韧性；2) 宏观风险（如VIX恐慌指数上升）可能压倒市场，引发全面下跌，使轧空机会失效；3) DOGE的Qlib高分可能只是统计噪声，而非真实动能，其低RSI和动量可能预示进一步盘整而非上涨。数据支撑反面结论：ETH的鲸鱼评分24h/7d均为负（-0.01），且稳定币流出（$-336,669），表明资金离场；SOL的鲸鱼评分更负（-0.28），代币抛售量大（-351,135.9 SOL），趋势可能延续。
red_team_audit.en: If my thesis is wrong, the most likely reasons are: 1) Whale selling (e.g., negative token flows for ETH and SOL) could persist, causing prices to eventually break key support rather than show resilience; 2) Macro risks (e.g., rising VIX) might overwhelm the market, triggering a broad decline and invalidating squeeze opportunities; 3) DOGE's high Qlib score could be statistical noise rather than real momentum, with its low RSI and momentum suggesting further consolidation instead of a rally. Data supporting the opposite view: ETH's whale sentiment scores are negative (-0.01 for both 24h/7d) with stablecoin outflow ($-336,669), indicating capital exit; SOL's whale sentiment is more negative (-0.28) with large token selling (-351,135.9 SOL), suggesting trend continuation.

Justification: These signals don't invalidate the trade because: a) Prices are holding steady under selling pressure (e.g., ETH at $2002), suggesting buyer absorption and possible hidden accumulation; b) Liquidation ratios show pain concentrated in longs (BTC, ETH, SOL), but DOGE and BNB have higher short pain, offering diversification; c) Market volatility is medium (average ATR normal), allowing for microstructure events.

analysis_summary.zh: [叙事校验]：当前市场处于熊市环境（1D RSI均低于45），但4H级别出现技术性超卖（RSI 35-45）与负资金费率（除ETH外），表明空头情绪过度。新闻与宏观背景（美联储利率稳定、日元走弱）未提供新驱动，价格走势与负面鲸鱼流向（ETH/SOL代币净流入交易所）呈现分歧，属于情绪分歧阶段，可能隐藏机构吸筹。[决策依据详情]：DOGE Qlib分数最高（0.0067），但技术面中性（RSI 45.84），鲸鱼数据缺失；SOL Qlib分数次高（0.0064），但鲸鱼流向显示代币净流入-351,125.8 SOL（抛售）且稳定币流出，与价格超卖（RSI 36.54）形成背离，暗示潜在轧空机会；ETH资金费率正（0.0018%）但鲸鱼代币净流入-1,136,524.2 ETH（抛售），稳定币流出，显示大户抛压。[痛苦交易]：基于爆仓多空比，SOL（1.86）和ETH（1.14）多头正遭受强平痛苦，而持仓L/S比显示SOL大户账户数比1.76（多头拥挤），结合负资金费率，存在多头挤压风险；DOGE爆仓多空比0.47（空头痛苦）但持仓L/S比1.64（多头拥挤），矛盾信号。[剧本选择]：选择MICROSTRUCTURE_SQUEEZE，因SOL和ETH的微观结构（拥挤多头+负资金费率+价格超卖）可能触发空头轧空或反弹，而鲸鱼流向与价格背离提供前端机会。
analysis_summary.en: [Narrative Validation]: Market is in bearish regime (1D RSI <45), but 4H shows technical oversold (RSI 35-45) and negative funding (except ETH), indicating excessive short sentiment. News/macro (Fed stable, Yen weakness) provides no new impulse; price action diverges from negative whale flows (ETH/SOL token net inflow to exchanges), suggesting hidden accumulation. [Decision Details]: DOGE has highest Qlib score (0.0067) but neutral tech (RSI 45.84) and missing whale data; SOL has second-highest Qlib score (0.0064) but whale flow shows token net inflow -351,125.8 SOL (selling) and stablecoin outflow, diverging from oversold price (RSI 36.54), hinting at squeeze potential; ETH has positive funding (0.0018%) but whale token net inflow -1,136,524.2 ETH (selling) and stablecoin outflow, indicating institutional selling. [Pain Trade]: Based on liquidation ratios, SOL (1.86) and ETH (1.14) longs are suffering, while L/S ratios show SOL whale account ratio 1.76 (crowded longs) with negative funding, posing long squeeze risk; DOGE liquidation ratio 0.47 (short pain) but L/S ratio 1.64 (crowded longs), conflicting signals. [Scenario Selection]: Choose MICROSTRUCTURE_SQUEEZE, as microstructure for SOL and ETH (crowded longs + negative funding + oversold price) may trigger short squeeze or bounce, with whale flow divergence offering front-run opportunity.

red_team_audit.zh: 如果判断错误，最可能的反向理由是：鲸鱼流向（ETH/SOL代币净流入交易所）可能持续，导致抛压加剧而非轧空；宏观风险（VIX 31.05恐慌上升）可能引发全市场下跌，掩盖微观结构信号；Qlib分数高的DOGE和SOL可能因技术面疲软（RSI低、动量负）而继续下跌，而非反弹。数据支撑反面结论：ETH稳定币流出（$-336,669）和SOL稳定币流出（$-115,334）表明资金离场，看跌；BTC 1D趋势看跌（价格低于SMA50）可能拖累小币。
red_team_audit.en: If thesis is wrong, most likely reasons: Whale flows (ETH/SOL token net inflow to exchanges) may persist, causing selling pressure instead of squeeze; macro risk (VIX 31.05 rising panic) could trigger broad market decline, overriding microstructure signals; high Qlib coins like DOGE and SOL may continue down due to weak tech (low RSI, negative momentum) rather than bounce. Data supporting opposite view: ETH stablecoin outflow ($-336,669) and SOL stablecoin outflow ($-115,334) indicate capital exit, bearish; BTC 1D trend bearish (price below SMA50) may drag altcoins.

contrary_signal_check.zh: 最明显的冲突信号：ETH和SOL的鲸鱼代币流向均为净流入交易所（抛售），与看涨背离假设矛盾；全球宏观VIX恐慌指数高（31.05）可能抑制风险资产。解释：这些信号反映当前抛压，但价格已超卖（RSI低）且资金费率负，可能已定价，微观轧空机会基于强制平仓而非基本面改善。
contrary_signal_check.en: Most significant contrary signals: Whale token flows for ETH and SOL are net inflow to exchanges (selling), contradicting bullish divergence hypothesis; global macro VIX panic high (31.05) may suppress risk assets. Justification: These signals reflect current selling pressure, but price is oversold (low RSI) with negative funding, possibly priced in; microstructure squeeze opportunity based on forced liquidation rather than fundamental improvement.

technical_signal.zh: 上/下影线比率：SOL上影线37%高于下影线7%，显示抛压；ETH下影线17%高于上影线10%，有托底。RSI与ADX状态：SOL RSI 35.3（超卖）、ADX 40.9（趋势强）；ETH RSI 37.4（超卖）、ADX 31.1（趋势中等）。价格与均线偏离度：SOL偏离SMA50 -5.84%，ETH偏离-3.93%，均超卖。
technical_signal.en: Upper/Lower Wick Ratio: SOL upper 37% > lower 7%, indicating selling pressure; ETH lower 17% > upper 10%, showing support. RSI & ADX status: SOL RSI 35.3 (oversold), ADX 40.9 (strong trend); ETH RSI 37.4 (oversold), ADX 31.1 (moderate trend). SMA deviation: SOL -5.84% from SMA50, ETH -3.93%, both oversold.

macro_onchain.zh: 过去24小时强平数据：SOL多单爆仓$993,982 vs 空单$533,633（多空比1.86），多头痛苦；ETH多单爆仓$5,080,005 vs 空单$4,468,519（多空比1.14），多头受压。巨鲸资金流向：ETH代币净流入-1,136,524.2 ETH（抛售），稳定币净流出$-336,669；SOL代币净流入-351,125.8 SOL（抛售），稳定币净流出$-115,334。资金费率：SOL -0.0140%（负），ETH 0.0018%（正）。
macro_onchain.en: 24h Liquidation Data: SOL long $993,982 vs short $533,633 (ratio 1.86), long pain; ETH long $5,080,005 vs short $4,468,519 (ratio 1.14), long pressure. Whale Net Inflow/Outflow: ETH token net inflow -1,136,524.2 ETH (selling), stablecoin outflow $-336,669; SOL token net inflow -351,125.8 SOL (selling), stablecoin outflow $-115,334. Funding Rate: SOL -0.0140% (negative), ETH 0.0018% (positive).

quantitative_analysis.zh: Qlib排名：DOGE第一（分数0.0067），SOL第二（0.0064），BTC第三（0.001）。DOGE分数显著但技术中性；SOL分数高且超卖，量价偏差（负资金费率Z-score -25.8353%）提供统计机会。
quantitative_analysis.en: Qlib ranking: DOGE first (score 0.0067), SOL second (0.0064), BTC third (0.001). DOGE score notable but tech neutral; SOL score high and oversold, with price-volume deviation (funding Z-score -25.8353%) offering statistical opportunity.

regime_safety.zh: WHALE_SQUEEZE：基于SOL和ETH的拥挤多头（持仓L/S比高）、负资金费率、价格超卖及爆仓多空比高，可能触发空头轧空或反弹，鲸鱼流向背离提供前端信号。
regime_safety.en: WHALE_SQUEEZE: Based on crowded longs (high L/S ratio), negative funding, oversold price, and high liquidation ratios for SOL and ETH, potential short squeeze or bounce, with whale flow divergence offering front-run signal.

analysis_summary.zh:
【叙事校验】当前市场处于熊市环境（所有资产价格低于SMA50，RSI_1D在41-45），但日内波动中性。宏观上美元走强（DXY 100.15）和VIX恐慌指数高企（31.05）带来风险规避情绪，但日元疲软（USD/JPY 159.704）暗示部分风险偏好。价格走势与负面宏观背景一致，未见新驱动，属于‘动能衰竭’状态。
【决策依据详情】Qlib模型预测DOGE和SOL相对强势（分数0.0067和0.0064），但技术面RSI均低于46，处于超卖边缘。ETH和SOL的鲸鱼代币流向为负（ETH -1,136,732.5 ETH，SOL -351,125.8 SOL），表示巨鲸在抛售，而稳定币流向也为负（ETH $-336,669，SOL $-116,951），表明资金离场，这与价格下跌相符。
【痛苦交易】基于爆仓多空比：SOL（1.86）、BTC（1.52）、ETH（1.13）显示多头正在被强平，而DOGE（0.47）和BNB（0.37）显示空头被强平。持仓L/S比中，DOGE（1.64/0.74）和SOL（1.76/0.83）的大户账户数多空比高，但持仓量比低，暗示散户多头拥挤，面临挤压风险。
【剧本选择】选择‘均值回归’剧本，因为技术指标（RSI低于40，价格偏离SMA50达-1.62%至-5.84%）和情绪指标（资金费率负值，如SOL -0.0140%）达到极端，但鲸鱼流向显示抛售，需谨慎。DOGE的Qlib排名第一且爆仓多空比低（0.47），提供短期反弹机会。
analysis_summary.en:
Narrative Synthesis (MANDATORY UNIQUE CONTENT):
1. [Narrative Validation]: Market is in a bearish regime with prices below SMA50 and daily RSI in low 40s, aligning with macro risk-off (strong DXY, high VIX). No new drivers; this is 'momentum exhaustion'.
2. [Decision Details]: Qlib predicts DOGE and SOL as top performers (scores 0.0067 and 0.0064), but technicals show RSI below 46, nearing oversold. Whale token flows for ETH and SOL are negative (net selling), and stablecoin flows are negative (capital outflow), confirming bearish pressure.
3. [Pain Trade]: Liquidation ratios indicate longs are being flushed in SOL (1.86), BTC (1.52), and ETH (1.13), while shorts are squeezed in DOGE (0.47) and BNB (0.37). L/S ratios show crowded retail longs in DOGE and SOL, risking a squeeze.
4. [Scenario Selection]: Chose 'MEAN_REVERSION' due to extreme technicals (low RSI, price deviations from SMA50) and sentiment (negative funding), but whale flows are bearish, requiring caution. DOGE's top Qlib rank and low liquidation ratio offer a short-term bounce setup.

red_team_audit.zh: 【强制要求全中文】如果判断错误，最可能的反向理由是：鲸鱼持续抛售（ETH和SOL的代币流向负值）可能推动价格进一步下跌，而非反弹。数据支撑：ETH和SOL的24h鲸鱼评分均为负（ETH -0.02，SOL -0.26），且稳定币流出，表明机构看跌。此外，宏观风险（高VIX）可能加剧抛售，使均值回归失效。
red_team_audit.en: Forced Contra-Argument: If the thesis is WRONG, the most likely reason is continued whale selling (negative token flows for ETH and SOL) driving prices lower instead of bouncing. Supporting data: ETH and SOL have negative 24h whale sentiment scores (-0.02 and -0.26) and stablecoin outflows, indicating institutional bearishness. Macro risks (high VIX) could amplify selling, invalidating mean reversion.

contrary_signal_check.en: List the most significant contrary signal or risk point and justify why it doesn't invalidate the trade: The most obvious conflict is negative whale token flows (net selling for ETH and SOL), typically bearish. However, this doesn't invalidate the trade because: 1) Technicals are extremely oversold (RSI below 40), potentially attracting buyers; 2) Liquidation ratios show shorts already squeezed in DOGE and BNB, reducing downside pressure; 3) Qlib model predicts short-term relative strength for DOGE and SOL, providing support.

analysis_summary.zh: 1. [叙事校验]：当前市场处于熊市环境（BTC RSI_1D=41.8），但宏观背景显示日元走弱（风险偏好）与VIX恐慌指数飙升（风险厌恶）并存，形成情绪分歧。价格走势与鲸鱼数据出现明显背离：ETH和SOL的鲸鱼代币流向均为负值（充币抛售），但价格未大幅下跌，暗示抛压可能被吸收，存在隐藏吸筹可能。2. [决策依据详情]：DOGE Qlib分数最高（0.0067），RSI（45.84）接近中性，资金费率（-0.0005%）轻微负值，技术面相对健康。SOL Qlib分数第二（0.0064），但RSI（36.54）超卖，资金费率（-0.0140%）显著负值，空头拥挤。ETH资金费率（0.0018%）为正，但鲸鱼代币流向（-1,136,732.5 ETH）和稳定币流向（$-336,669）均为负，显示机构看跌。3. [痛苦交易]：基于爆仓多空比，SOL（1.87）和BTC（1.52）多头正在遭受强平痛苦，空头轧空机会较高；DOGE（0.46）和BNB（0.37）空头正在被强平，多头挤压风险低。4. [剧本选择]：选择MICROSTRUCTURE_SQUEEZE剧本，因为SOL和BTC的空头拥挤（资金费率负值、爆仓多空比高），价格若反弹可能触发空头轧空，且Qlib分数支持SOL的相对强势。
analysis_summary.en: 1. [Narrative Validation]: Market is in bearish regime (BTC RSI_1D=41.8), but macro shows mixed signals: Yen weakness (risk-on) vs VIX spike (risk-off), creating sentiment divergence. Price action diverges from whale data: ETH and SOL have negative token flows (selling to exchanges) yet prices hold, suggesting hidden accumulation. 2. [Decision Details]: DOGE has highest Qlib score (0.0067), RSI (45.84) near neutral, funding rate (-0.0005%) slightly negative. SOL has second-highest Qlib score (0.0064) but oversold RSI (36.54) and highly negative funding (-0.0140%), indicating crowded shorts. ETH has positive funding (0.0018%) but negative whale token flow (-1,136,732.5 ETH) and stablecoin flow ($-336,669), signaling institutional bearishness. 3. [Pain Trade]: Based on liquidation ratios, SOL (1.87) and BTC (1.52) longs are suffering pain, creating short squeeze potential; DOGE (0.46) and BNB (0.37) shorts are being liquidated, low long squeeze risk. 4. [Scenario Selection]: Choose MICROSTRUCTURE_SQUEEZE playbook due to crowded shorts in SOL and BTC (negative funding, high liquidation ratios), with potential for short squeeze if price rebounds, supported by SOL's high Qlib score.

analysis_summary.zh: 1. [叙事校验]：当前市场处于熊市环境（BTC RSI_1D=41.8，价格低于SMA50），宏观背景显示VIX恐慌指数升至31.05（极端恐慌），美元走强（DXY=100.15），风险偏好下降。价格走势与负面宏观一致，但Qlib模型预测DOGE和SOL有相对强势（分数0.0067和0.0064），形成情绪分歧：整体市场看跌，但部分山寨币有超跌反弹潜力。2. [决策依据详情]：DOGE排名第一（Qlib分数0.0067），RSI_14=45.84接近中性，爆仓多空比0.46（空头爆仓更多），显示空头受压；SOL排名第二（Qlib分数0.0064），RSI_14=36.54超卖，爆仓多空比1.87（多头爆仓更多），但资金费率-0.0140%负值，可能引发空头轧空。3. [痛苦交易]：ETH和SOL的爆仓多空比分别为1.15和1.87，显示多头正在遭受强平痛苦，尤其是SOL多头爆仓$996,313远高于空头$533,633，存在多头挤压风险；DOGE空头爆仓$1,765,150高于多头$803,739，空头可能被轧空。4. [剧本选择]：选择MEAN_REVERSION剧本，因为SOL和DOGE技术指标超卖（RSI低于40），资金费率负值，且爆仓数据显示相反方受压，均值回归概率高。
analysis_summary.en: 1. [Narrative Validation]: Market is in bearish regime (BTC RSI_1D=41.8, price below SMA50), macro shows VIX at 31.05 (extreme panic), DXY strong at 100.15, risk-off sentiment. Price action aligns with negative macro, but Qlib predicts relative strength for DOGE and SOL (scores 0.0067 and 0.0064), creating divergence: overall bearish but some altcoins oversold. 2. [Decision Details]: DOGE ranks #1 (Qlib score 0.0067), RSI_14=45.84 near neutral, liquidation ratio 0.46 (more short liquidations), indicating short pressure; SOL ranks #2 (Qlib score 0.0064), RSI_14=36.54 oversold, liquidation ratio 1.87 (more long liquidations), but funding rate -0.0140% negative, potential short squeeze. 3. [Pain Trade]: ETH and SOL have liquidation ratios 1.15 and 1.87, showing longs under liquidation pain, especially SOL with $996,313 long vs $533,633 short, risk of long squeeze; DOGE has $1,765,150 short vs $803,739 long, potential short squeeze. 4. [Scenario Selection]: Choose MEAN_REVERSION scenario, as SOL and DOGE are oversold (RSI below 40), funding negative, and liquidation data shows opposite side pressured, high probability of mean reversion.

red_team_audit.zh: 如果判断错误，最可能的反向理由是：1) 宏观风险加剧（如VIX继续飙升或美元更强），可能压制所有加密货币，导致超卖资产进一步下跌；2) 鲸鱼数据中ETH和SOL的代币净流向为负（充币抛售），显示机构看跌，可能带动市场下行；3) BTC作为龙头持续疲软（RSI_14=39.34），可能拖累山寨币反弹失败。数据支撑反面结论：ETH鲸鱼评分24h=-0.02，SOL鲸鱼评分24h=-0.39，均显示负面情绪。
red_team_audit.en: If the thesis is wrong, the most likely reasons are: 1) Macro risks worsen (e.g., VIX rises further or DXY strengthens), suppressing all cryptos and causing oversold assets to drop more; 2) Whale data shows negative token net flow for ETH and SOL (deposits to exchange), indicating institutional bearishness that may drive market down; 3) BTC as leader remains weak (RSI_14=39.34), potentially dragging altcoin rebounds. Data supporting opposite view: ETH whale score 24h=-0.02, SOL whale score 24h=-0.39, both negative.

contrary_signal_check.zh: 最明显的冲突信号：1) ETH和SOL的鲸鱼代币流向为负（充币抛售），与看涨的均值回归剧本矛盾；2) 整体市场环境为熊市（BTC RSI_1D=41.8），可能压制反弹幅度。解释：这些信号反映机构短期抛压，但技术超卖和爆仓数据显示零售端痛苦可能反转，且Qlib分数支持相对强势，因此剧本仍可行但需谨慎。
contrary_signal_check.en: Most significant contrary signals: 1) Whale token net flow negative for ETH and SOL (deposits to exchange), contradicting bullish mean reversion play; 2) Overall market regime bearish (BTC RSI_1D=41.8), may limit rebound. Justification: These signals show institutional selling pressure short-term, but technical oversold and liquidation data indicate retail pain may reverse, and Qlib scores support relative strength, so scenario still viable but cautious.

analysis_summary.zh: [叙事校验]：当前市场处于熊市环境（BTC RSI_1D=41.9，价格低于SMA50），宏观背景显示VIX恐慌指数上升至31.05（极端恐慌），美元指数走强（风险规避），但日元走弱（风险偏好），信号矛盾。价格走势与新闻脱节，无明显新驱动，属于动能衰竭阶段。QLib预测DOGE和SOL相对强势，但技术面普遍超卖（RSI 36-46），市场情绪悲观（资金费率多为负）。[决策依据详情]：DOGE Qlib分数最高（0.0067），RSI 45.84接近中性，爆仓多空比0.46显示空头爆仓更多，但缺乏鲸鱼数据。SOL Qlib分数次高（0.0064），RSI 36.6超卖，爆仓多空比1.87显示多头受压，鲸鱼代币流向为负（充币抛售），但稳定币流入（看涨）。[痛苦交易]：基于持仓L/S比，DOGE大户账户数比1.67（多头拥挤），但爆仓多空比0.46（空头爆仓更多），可能形成空头挤压陷阱。SOL持仓L/S比1.74（多头拥挤），爆仓多空比1.87（多头爆仓更多），存在多头挤压风险。[剧本选择]：选择MEAN_REVERSION剧本，因为技术指标超卖（RSI低）、资金费率负极端，且鲸鱼流向矛盾（代币抛售但稳定币流入），预示潜在反转机会，胜算较高。
analysis_summary.en: [Narrative Validation]: Market is in bearish regime (BTC RSI_1D=41.9, price below SMA50), macro context shows VIX rising to 31.05 (extreme panic) and DXY stronger (risk-off), but JPY weakness (risk-on), creating mixed signals. Price action lacks new drivers, indicating momentum exhaustion. QLib predicts DOGE and SOL relative strength, but technicals are oversold (RSI 36-46) with bearish sentiment (negative funding rates). [Decision Details]: DOGE has highest Qlib score (0.0067), RSI 45.84 near neutral, liquidation long/short ratio 0.46 shows more short liquidations, but lacks whale data. SOL has second-highest Qlib score (0.0064), RSI 36.6 oversold, liquidation ratio 1.87 indicates long pressure, whale token flow negative (to exchange) but stablecoin inflow (bullish). [Pain Trade]: Based on L/S ratios, DOGE has crowded longs (account ratio 1.67) but more short liquidations (ratio 0.46), suggesting a potential short squeeze trap. SOL has crowded longs (account ratio 1.74) and more long liquidations (ratio 1.87), indicating long squeeze risk. [Scenario Selection]: Choose MEAN_REVERSION scenario due to oversold technicals (low RSI), extreme negative funding, and contradictory whale flows (token selling vs stablecoin inflow), offering high-probability reversal opportunities.

red_team_audit.zh: [强制对立面]：如果判断错误，最可能的原因是市场延续熊市趋势，而非反转。支撑反面结论的数据包括：1) 全球宏观风险规避（VIX高、DXY强）可能压制反弹；2) 鲸鱼代币流向为负（ETH和SOL充币抛售）显示机构看跌；3) 持仓L/S比显示多头拥挤，可能进一步挤压下跌；4) Qlib分数虽高但绝对值低（DOGE 0.0067），预测强度有限。
red_team_audit.en: [Forced Contra-Argument]: If the thesis is wrong, the most likely reason is continued bearish trend rather than reversal. Data supporting opposite view: 1) Global macro risk-off (high VIX, strong DXY) may suppress rebounds; 2) Whale token flows negative (ETH and SOL to exchange) indicate institutional bearishness; 3) L/S ratios show crowded longs, risking further squeeze down; 4) Qlib scores are high but low in magnitude (DOGE 0.0067), limiting predictive strength.

contrary_signal_check.zh: [冲突信号]：1) 鲸鱼代币流向为负（ETH -1,136,732.5 ETH，SOL -345,470.8 SOL）显示抛售压力，与看涨反转矛盾。2) 持仓L/S比显示多头拥挤（如DOGE 1.67），增加下跌风险。3) 宏观环境风险规避（VIX 31.05）。[解释]：这些信号不会推翻交易结论，因为技术面超卖（RSI低）和资金费率负极端已定价悲观情绪，鲸鱼稳定币流入（SOL $8,684）暗示潜在抄底，且爆仓数据（如DOGE空头爆仓更多）支持反转动力。
contrary_signal_check.en: [Contrary Signals]: 1) Whale token flows negative (ETH -1,136,732.5 ETH, SOL -345,470.8 SOL) show selling pressure, contradicting bullish reversal. 2) L/S ratios indicate crowded longs (e.g., DOGE 1.67), increasing downside risk. 3) Macro risk-off (VIX 31.05). [Justification]: These do not invalidate the trade because oversold technicals (low RSI) and extreme negative funding have priced in pessimism, whale stablecoin inflow (SOL $8,684) hints at potential accumulation, and liquidation data (e.g., more short liquidations in DOGE) supports reversal momentum.

analysis_summary.zh: [叙事校验]：当前市场处于熊市环境（1D RSI均低于45），价格普遍低于SMA50（偏离度-1.63%至-5.85%），显示整体动能疲软。宏观背景中VIX恐慌指数升至31.05（极端恐慌），美元走强（DXY 100.15），风险偏好下降，但日元走弱（USD/JPY 159.704）提供部分风险支持。价格走势与负面宏观一致，无新驱动，属于动能衰竭阶段。[决策依据详情]：Qlib排名显示DOGE（分数0.0067）和SOL（0.0064）相对强势，但技术面RSI均低于46（DOGE 45.84，SOL 36.54），ADX中等（SOL 40.9，ETH 31.0），表明趋势弱化。鲸鱼数据中ETH和SOL的Token Flow和Stablecoin Flow均为负（ETH代币流出-1,136,524.2 ETH，稳定币流出$-336,669；SOL代币流出-345,470.8 SOL，稳定币流出$-115,334），显示巨鲸抛售，与价格下跌一致。[痛苦交易]：基于爆仓多空比，SOL（1.87）、BTC（1.52）、ETH（1.15）的多单爆仓高于空单，表明多头受压，存在强制平仓风险；DOGE（0.46）和BNB（0.37）的空单爆仓更高，但整体L/S比显示大户账户多空比偏高（DOGE 1.67，SOL 1.74），可能形成多头拥挤陷阱。[剧本选择]：选择MEAN_REVERSION剧本，因为技术指标（RSI低于40，价格偏离SMA50）和情绪极端（SOL资金费率-0.0140%，Z-Score -25.8353%）提供反转机会，且鲸鱼流出可能预示抛压衰竭，但需谨慎避免趋势跟随。
analysis_summary.en: [Narrative Validation]: Market is in a bearish regime (1D RSI all below 45), with prices below SMA50 (deviations -1.63% to -5.85%), indicating weak momentum. Macro context shows VIX at 31.05 (extreme panic), DXY strong at 100.15 (risk-off), but USD/JPY weakness at 159.704 provides some risk support. Price action aligns with negative macro, no new drivers, suggesting momentum exhaustion. [Decision Details]: Qlib ranks DOGE (score 0.0067) and SOL (0.0064) as relatively strong, but technicals show RSI below 46 (DOGE 45.84, SOL 36.54) and ADX moderate (SOL 40.9, ETH 31.0), indicating weak trends. Whale data for ETH and SOL shows negative Token Flow and Stablecoin Flow (ETH token outflow -1,136,524.2 ETH, stablecoin outflow $-336,669; SOL token outflow -345,470.8 SOL, stablecoin outflow $-115,334), indicating whale selling, consistent with price drops. [Pain Trade]: Based on liquidation ratios, SOL (1.87), BTC (1.52), and ETH (1.15) have higher long liquidations, suggesting trapped longs and forced exit risk; DOGE (0.46) and BNB (0.37) have higher short liquidations, but overall L/S ratios show high long bias in accounts (DOGE 1.67, SOL 1.74), potentially forming crowded long traps. [Scenario Selection]: Choose MEAN_REVERSION playbook due to extreme technicals (RSI below 40, price deviations from SMA50) and sentiment (SOL funding rate -0.0140%, Z-Score -25.8353%) offering reversal potential, and whale outflows possibly indicating selling exhaustion, but caution to avoid trend following.

red_team_audit.zh: 如果判断错误，最可能的反向理由是：1) 鲸鱼流出持续，价格进一步下跌而非反转，因为Token Flow和Stablecoin Flow均为负且24h与7d趋势一致，可能预示更大抛压。2) 宏观风险加剧，如VIX继续上升或美元走强，压制整体市场反弹。3) 技术面RSI虽低但可能进入超卖区后继续下行，ADX显示趋势强度（SOL 40.9）可能支持下跌延续。4) Qlib分数高的DOGE和SOL可能只是短期相对强势，而非绝对上涨信号。数据支撑反面结论：ETH和SOL的鲸鱼评分负（ETH 24h -0.02，SOL 24h -0.39），资金费率负（SOL -0.0140%），显示看跌情绪浓厚。
red_team_audit.en: If the thesis is wrong, the most likely reasons are: 1) Whale outflows persist, leading to further price declines rather than reversal, as Token Flow and Stablecoin Flow are negative and consistent over 24h and 7d, possibly indicating larger selling pressure. 2) Macro risks worsen, such as VIX rising further or DXY strengthening, suppressing overall market rebound. 3) Technicals like low RSI could enter oversold territory and continue downward, with ADX showing trend strength (SOL 40.9) possibly supporting continued decline. 4) High Qlib scores for DOGE and SOL might only indicate short-term relative strength, not absolute bullish signals. Data supporting opposite view: Whale scores negative (ETH 24h -0.02, SOL 24h -0.39), funding rates negative (SOL -0.0140%), indicating bearish sentiment.

contrary_signal_check.zh: 当前最明显的冲突信号：1) 鲸鱼代币和稳定币流向均为负，与看涨反转矛盾，可能预示更多下跌。2) 爆仓多空比显示多头受压（SOL 1.87，BTC 1.52），但L/S比显示大户账户多空比高（DOGE 1.67，SOL 1.74），形成拥挤多头陷阱，增加反转失败风险。3) 宏观环境熊市（VIX 31.05，DXY 100.15）可能压制反弹。解释：这些风险不会推翻交易结论，因为技术极端（RSI低，价格偏离SMA50）和情绪极端（资金费率负）提供均值回归基础，且鲸鱼流出可能已反映在价格中，抛压或衰竭。
contrary_signal_check.en: Most significant contrary signals: 1) Whale Token Flow and Stablecoin Flow are negative, contradicting bullish reversal, possibly indicating more declines. 2) Liquidation ratios show longs under pressure (SOL 1.87, BTC 1.52), but L/S ratios show high long bias in accounts (DOGE 1.67, SOL 1.74), creating crowded long traps, increasing reversal failure risk. 3) Macro environment bearish (VIX 31.05, DXY 100.15) may suppress rebound. Justification: These risks don't invalidate the trade because technical extremes (low RSI, price deviations from SMA50) and sentiment extremes (negative funding rates) provide mean reversion basis, and whale outflows may already be priced in, with selling pressure possibly exhausting.

technical_signal.zh: 1) 上/下影线比率：ETH上影线58%、下影线1%，显示上方抛压重；SOL上影线43%、下影线14%，抛压中等；DOGE上影线30%、下影线40%，下方支撑较强。2) RSI与ADX状态：RSI普遍低于46（DOGE 45.84最高），处于中性偏弱；ADX中低（SOL 40.9最高），趋势强度一般。3) 价格与均线偏离度：所有资产价格低于SMA50，偏离度-1.63%（DOGE）至-5.85%（SOL），显示超卖。
technical_signal.en: 1) Upper/Lower Wick Ratio: ETH upper 58%, lower 1%, indicating heavy selling pressure above; SOL upper 43%, lower 14%, moderate pressure; DOGE upper 30%, lower 40%, stronger support below. 2) RSI & ADX status: RSI generally below 46 (DOGE 45.84 highest), neutral-weak; ADX low-moderate (SOL 40.9 highest), trend strength modest. 3) SMA deviation: All assets below SMA50, deviations -1.63% (DOGE) to -5.85% (SOL), indicating oversold.

macro_onchain.en: 1) 24h Liquidation Data & Long/Short Liquidation Ratio: SOL long $996,313 vs short $533,633 (ratio 1.87), BTC long $5,139,123 vs short $3,380,835 (ratio 1.52), showing long pain. 2) Whale Net Inflow/Outflow: ETH and SOL Token Flow and Stablecoin Flow negative, whale selling. 3) Funding Rate: SOL -0.0140% (negative extreme), BTC -0.0054% (negative), ETH 0.0018% (slightly positive), indicating bearish sentiment.

quantitative_analysis.zh: Qlib排名靠前的币种：DOGE（分数0.0067，排名1）和SOL（0.0064，排名2）显示相对强势，但分数绝对值低，显著性一般。量价偏差：SOL资金费率Z-Score -25.8353%，显示统计异常，可能过度悲观；DOGE动量0.0125为正，但整体市场弱。

analysis_summary.zh:
[叙事校验]：当前市场处于熊市环境（全市场RSI_1D均低于46，价格低于SMA50），宏观背景显示VIX恐慌指数升至31.05（极端恐慌），美元走强（DXY=100.15），风险偏好下降。价格走势与宏观风险规避一致，但鲸鱼数据出现分歧：ETH显示巨鲸提币囤货（Token Flow=+58,875.3 ETH）和稳定币流入（+$89,950），而SOL显示稳定币流出（-$68,703），表明机构在ETH上可能进行隐藏吸筹，而在SOL上可能减持。这构成情绪分歧，价格下跌但部分鲸鱼在积累，暗示潜在转折点。
[决策依据详情]：技术面：ETH RSI(14)=39.3（超卖区域），上影线比率79%（抛压显著），均线乖离度-3.94%（价格低于SMA50）；SOL RSI(14)=36.1（超卖），上影线比率50%（抛压），均线乖离度-5.85%（深度偏离）。量化：Qlib排名SOL第一（得分0.009），DOGE第二（得分0.0053），但Qlib数据过时（截至2026-03-28），需谨慎。
[痛苦交易]：基于爆仓多空比：SOL为1.87（多头爆仓显著高于空头），ETH为1.15（多头略受压），BTC为1.52（多头受压），DOGE为0.46（空头爆仓更高）。结合持仓L/S比：SOL大户账户数比1.74（多头拥挤），ETH为1.53（多头略多），DOGE为1.67（多头拥挤）。SOL和ETH的多头可能处于强制平仓边缘，形成轧空风险。
[剧本选择]：选择MEAN_REVERSION剧本，因为技术指标（RSI超卖、均线深度偏离）和鲸鱼流向（ETH积累）显示极端读数，价格可能反弹。拒绝TREND_FOLLOWING（趋势熊市，动量负值）和MICROSTRUCTURE_SQUEEZE（虽然有多头挤压风险，但鲸鱼数据不支持一致轧空信号）。
analysis_summary.en:
[Narrative Validation]: Market is in a bearish regime (all 1D RSI <46, price below SMA50), macro context shows VIX at 31.05 (extreme panic), DXY strengthening (100.15), risk-off sentiment. Price action aligns with macro risk aversion, but whale data diverges: ETH shows token withdrawal (+58,875.3 ETH) and stablecoin inflow (+$89,950), while SOL shows stablecoin outflow (-$68,703), indicating institutional accumulation in ETH and potential distribution in SOL. This creates sentiment divergence, with price down but some whales accumulating, hinting at a potential turning point.
[Decision Details]: Technicals: ETH RSI(14)=39.3 (oversold), upper wick ratio 79% (selling pressure), SMA deviation -3.94%; SOL RSI(14)=36.1 (oversold), upper wick ratio 50%, SMA deviation -5.85%. Quantitative: Qlib ranks SOL first (score 0.009), DOGE second (score 0.0053), but data is stale (as of 2026-03-28), use with caution.
[Pain Trade]: Based on liquidation ratios: SOL 1.87 (longs heavily liquidated), ETH 1.15 (longs slightly pressured), BTC 1.52 (longs pressured), DOGE 0.46 (shorts liquidated more). Combined with L/S ratios: SOL whale account ratio 1.74 (crowded long), ETH 1.53 (slightly long-biased), DOGE 1.67 (crowded long). Longs in SOL and ETH may be near forced exits, creating squeeze risks.
[Scenario Selection]: Choose MEAN_REVERSION playbook, as technical extremes (oversold RSI, deep SMA deviation) and whale flow (ETH accumulation) indicate potential reversal. Reject TREND_FOLLOWING (bearish trend, negative momentum) and MICROSTRUCTURE_SQUEEZE (while long squeeze risk exists, whale data lacks consistent squeeze signals).

red_team_audit.zh: 如果我的判断错误，最可能的反向理由是：1) 宏观风险持续恶化（VIX进一步上升或美元走强），导致所有资产继续下跌，无视超卖技术指标。2) 鲸鱼流向可能滞后或误导，ETH的提币可能用于其他目的而非积累，SOL的稳定币流出可能预示更大抛压。3) Qlib数据过时，当前市场可能已变化，SOL的相对强度可能已减弱。数据支撑反面结论：平均动量-0.0117（负值），资金费率普遍负或低（如SOL -0.0140%），表明杠杆情绪看跌，反弹可能短暂。
red_team_audit.en: If my thesis is wrong, the most likely reasons are: 1) Macro risks worsen further (VIX rises more or DXY strengthens), causing all assets to continue falling despite oversold technicals. 2) Whale flows could be lagging or misleading; ETH withdrawals might be for other purposes not accumulation, and SOL stablecoin outflow could signal larger selling pressure. 3) Qlib data is stale, and market conditions may have shifted; SOL's relative strength may have weakened. Data supporting opposite view: average momentum -0.0117 (negative), funding rates generally negative or low (e.g., SOL -0.0140%), indicating bearish leverage sentiment, and any bounce could be short-lived.

contrary_signal_check.zh: 目前最明显的冲突信号或风险点：1) 市场整体趋势熊市（价格低于SMA50，RSI_1D看跌），可能压制任何反弹尝试。2) SOL的爆仓多空比1.87显示多头痛苦，但稳定币流出（-$68,703）与积累信号矛盾，增加不确定性。3) BTC作为基准，其爆仓多空比1.52和负资金费率（-0.0054%）可能拖累其他币种。我判断这些不会推翻交易结论，因为：技术超卖（RSI<40）和鲸鱼积累（ETH）提供支撑，痛苦交易可能触发轧空，且风险通过严格止损控制。
contrary_signal_check.en: Most significant contrary signals or risks: 1) Overall market trend is bearish (price below SMA50, 1D RSI bearish), which could suppress any rebound attempts. 2) SOL's liquidation ratio 1.87 shows long pain, but stablecoin outflow (-$68,703) contradicts accumulation signals, adding uncertainty. 3) BTC as benchmark has liquidation ratio 1.52 and negative funding (-0.0054%), potentially dragging other coins. I judge these won't invalidate the trade because: technical oversold (RSI<40) and whale accumulation (ETH) provide support, pain trade could trigger a squeeze, and risks are controlled via strict stop-loss.

analysis_summary.zh:
[叙事校验]：当前市场处于熊市环境（全市场RSI_1D均低于46，价格低于SMA50），宏观背景显示VIX恐慌指数升至31.05（极端恐慌），美元走强（DXY=100.15），风险偏好下降。价格走势与宏观风险规避一致，但鲸鱼数据出现分歧：ETH显示巨鲸提币囤货（Token Flow=+58,875.3 ETH）和稳定币流入（+$89,950），而SOL显示稳定币流出（-$68,703），表明机构在ETH上可能进行隐藏吸筹，而在SOL上可能减持。这构成情绪分歧，价格下跌但部分鲸鱼在积累，暗示潜在转折点。
[决策依据详情]：技术面：ETH RSI(14)=39.3（超卖区域），上影线比率79%（抛压显著），均线乖离度-3.94%（价格低于SMA50）；SOL RSI(14)=36.1（超卖），上影线比率50%（抛压），均线乖离度-5.85%（深度偏离）。量化：Qlib排名SOL第一（得分0.009），DOGE第二（得分0.0053），但Qlib数据过时（截至2026-03-28），需谨慎。
[痛苦交易]：基于爆仓多空比：SOL为1.87（多头爆仓显著高于空头），ETH为1.15（多头略受压），BTC为1.52（多头受压），DOGE为0.46（空头爆仓更高）。结合持仓L/S比：SOL大户账户数比1.74（多头拥挤），ETH为1.53（多头略多），DOGE为1.67（多头拥挤）。SOL和ETH的多头可能处于强制平仓边缘，形成轧空风险。
[剧本选择]：选择MEAN_REVERSION剧本，因为技术指标（RSI超卖、均线深度偏离）和鲸鱼流向（ETH积累）显示极端读数，价格可能反弹。拒绝TREND_FOLLOWING（趋势熊市，动量负值）和MICROSTRUCTURE_SQUEEZE（虽然有多头挤压风险，但鲸鱼数据不支持一致轧空信号）。
analysis_summary.en:
[Narrative Validation]: Market is in a bearish regime (all 1D RSI <46, price below SMA50), macro context shows VIX at 31.05 (extreme panic), DXY strengthening (100.15), risk-off sentiment. Price action aligns with macro risk aversion, but whale data diverges: ETH shows token withdrawal (+58,875.3 ETH) and stablecoin inflow (+$89,950), while SOL shows stablecoin outflow (-$68,703), indicating institutional accumulation in ETH and potential distribution in SOL. This creates sentiment divergence, with price down but some whales accumulating, hinting at a potential turning point.
[Decision Details]: Technicals: ETH RSI(14)=39.3 (oversold), upper wick ratio 79% (selling pressure), SMA deviation -3.94%; SOL RSI(14)=36.1 (oversold), upper wick ratio 50%, SMA deviation -5.85%. Quantitative: Qlib ranks SOL first (score 0.009), DOGE second (score 0.0053), but data is stale (as of 2026-03-28), use with caution.
[Pain Trade]: Based on liquidation ratios: SOL 1.87 (longs heavily liquidated), ETH 1.15 (longs slightly pressured), BTC 1.52 (longs pressured), DOGE 0.46 (shorts liquidated more). Combined with L/S ratios: SOL whale account ratio 1.74 (crowded long), ETH 1.53 (slightly long-biased), DOGE 1.67 (crowded long). Longs in SOL and ETH may be near forced exits, creating squeeze risks.
[Scenario Selection]: Choose MEAN_REVERSION playbook, as technical extremes (oversold RSI, deep SMA deviation) and whale flow (ETH accumulation) indicate potential reversal. Reject TREND_FOLLOWING (bearish trend, negative momentum) and MICROSTRUCTURE_SQUEEZE (while long squeeze risk exists, whale data lacks consistent squeeze signals).

red_team_audit.zh: 如果我的判断错误，最可能的反向理由是：1) 宏观风险持续恶化（VIX进一步上升或美元走强），导致所有资产继续下跌，无视超卖技术指标。2) 鲸鱼流向可能滞后或误导，ETH的提币可能用于其他目的而非积累，SOL的稳定币流出可能预示更大抛压。3) Qlib数据过时，当前市场可能已变化，SOL的相对强度可能已减弱。数据支撑反面结论：平均动量-0.0117（负值），资金费率普遍负或低（如SOL -0.0140%），表明杠杆情绪看跌，反弹可能短暂。
red_team_audit.en: If my thesis is wrong, the most likely reasons are: 1) Macro risks worsen further (VIX rises more or DXY strengthens), causing all assets to continue falling despite oversold technicals. 2) Whale flows could be lagging or misleading; ETH withdrawals might be for other purposes not accumulation, and SOL stablecoin outflow could signal larger selling pressure. 3) Qlib data is stale, and market conditions may have shifted; SOL's relative strength may have weakened. Data supporting opposite view: average momentum -0.0117 (negative), funding rates generally negative or low (e.g., SOL -0.0140%), indicating bearish leverage sentiment, and any bounce could be short-lived.

contrary_signal_check.zh: 目前最明显的冲突信号或风险点：1) 市场整体趋势熊市（价格低于SMA50，RSI_1D看跌），可能压制任何反弹尝试。2) SOL的爆仓多空比1.87显示多头痛苦，但稳定币流出（-$68,703）与积累信号矛盾，增加不确定性。3) BTC作为基准，其爆仓多空比1.52和负资金费率（-0.0054%）可能拖累其他币种。我判断这些不会推翻交易结论，因为：技术超卖（RSI<40）和鲸鱼积累（ETH）提供支撑，痛苦交易可能触发轧空，且风险通过严格止损控制。
contrary_signal_check.en: Most significant contrary signals or risks: 1) Overall market trend is bearish (price below SMA50, 1D RSI bearish), which could suppress any rebound attempts. 2) SOL's liquidation ratio 1.87 shows long pain, but stablecoin outflow (-$68,703) contradicts accumulation signals, adding uncertainty. 3) BTC as benchmark has liquidation ratio 1.52 and negative funding (-0.0054%), potentially dragging other coins. I judge these won't invalidate the trade because: technical oversold (RSI<40) and whale accumulation (ETH) provide support, pain trade could trigger a squeeze, and risks are controlled via strict stop-loss.

analysis_summary.zh:
[叙事校验]：当前市场处于熊市环境，BTC、ETH、SOL、BNB、DOGE均低于SMA50，RSI在37-46之间，显示整体疲软。宏观上，VIX恐慌指数升至31.05，美元指数走强，风险偏好下降。新闻面暂无重大驱动，价格走势与熊市背景一致，属于动能衰竭阶段，而非新信号触发。
[决策依据详情]：DOGE Qlib分数最高（0.013），排名第一，但RSI 45.93中性偏弱，资金费率0.0097%为正且Z-score高达96.04%，显示多头拥挤。SOL Qlib分数0.005排名第二，但RSI 37.77超卖，资金费率-0.0248%为负且Z-score -112.62%极端负值，空头情绪浓厚。ETH和SOL的鲸鱼代币流向均为负（充币抛售），稳定币流向也为负（资金离场），表明机构看跌。
[痛苦交易]：基于爆仓多空比，DOGE为0.44（空头爆仓远多于多头），SOL为1.79（多头爆仓远多于空头），显示DOGE空头受压可能反弹，SOL多头受压可能续跌。持仓L/S比中，DOGE大户账户数比1.68（多头拥挤），SOL大户账户数比1.77（多头拥挤），但价格下跌中，存在多头挤压风险。
[剧本选择]：选择MEAN_REVERSION剧本，因为SOL技术面超卖（RSI 37.77）、资金费率极端负值（-0.0248%）、爆仓多空比1.79显示多头已大量爆仓，抛压可能衰竭，存在反弹机会。DOGE虽Qlib强但多头拥挤且空头爆仓高，避免追高，以监控为主。
analysis_summary.en:
[Narrative Validation]: Market is in a bearish regime with BTC, ETH, SOL, BNB, DOGE all below SMA50 and RSI 37-46, indicating overall weakness. Macro shows VIX at 31.05 (extreme panic) and DXY strengthening, reducing risk appetite. No major news drivers; price action aligns with bearish background, representing momentum exhaustion rather than new triggers.
[Decision Details]: DOGE has highest Qlib score (0.013) and rank 1, but RSI 45.93 is neutral-weak, funding rate 0.0097% positive with Z-score 96.04% showing crowded longs. SOL has Qlib score 0.005 rank 2, but RSI 37.77 oversold, funding rate -0.0248% negative with Z-score -112.62% extreme negative, indicating heavy short sentiment. Whale token flows for ETH and SOL are negative (to exchange selling), stablecoin flows negative (capital outflow), suggesting institutional bearishness.
[Pain Trade]: Based on liquidation ratios, DOGE at 0.44 (short liquidations much higher than longs) and SOL at 1.79 (long liquidations much higher than shorts), indicating DOGE shorts may be squeezed for a bounce, SOL longs may be flushed for further decline. In L/S ratios, DOGE whale account ratio 1.68 (crowded longs) and SOL 1.77 (crowded longs), but with price falling, there is long squeeze risk.
[Scenario Selection]: Choose MEAN_REVERSION playbook because SOL is technically oversold (RSI 37.77), has extreme negative funding (-0.0248%), and liquidation ratio 1.79 shows longs already heavily liquidated, suggesting selling pressure may exhaust for a bounce. DOGE, despite strong Qlib, has crowded longs and high short liquidations, so avoid chasing and monitor instead.

red_team_audit.zh: 如果我的判断错误，最可能的反向理由是：1) 整体熊市趋势可能延续，SOL超卖后可能继续下跌而非反弹，因为鲸鱼代币流向显示持续抛售（24h -345,470.8 SOL），机构看跌情绪强。2) DOGE的Qlib强势可能被多头拥挤和正资金费率拖累，导致价格下跌而非上涨。3) 宏观风险（VIX高、DXY强）可能压制所有风险资产，使均值回归失效。数据支撑：SOL鲸鱼评分-0.34（负面），ETH类似流向负，表明机构资金流出可能持续。
red_team_audit.en: If my thesis is wrong, the most likely reasons are: 1) Overall bearish trend may persist, SOL could continue falling instead of bouncing despite oversold conditions, as whale token flow shows ongoing selling (24h -345,470.8 SOL) and institutional bearishness. 2) DOGE's Qlib strength may be outweighed by crowded longs and positive funding, leading to price decline rather than rise. 3) Macro risks (high VIX, strong DXY) could suppress all risk assets, invalidating mean reversion. Supporting data: SOL whale score -0.34 (negative), ETH similar negative flows, indicating institutional outflow may continue.

contrary_signal_check.zh: 目前最明显的冲突信号：1) SOL的鲸鱼代币流向为负（充币抛售），稳定币流向也为负（资金离场），这与看涨反弹相矛盾。2) 整体市场趋势熊市，可能压制SOL的反弹幅度。解释：这些信号确实存在风险，但SOL的极端超卖（RSI 37.77）和空头情绪（资金费率负）已部分定价，爆仓多空比1.79显示多头痛苦可能出清，技术面反弹概率仍高，且仓位将严格控制风险（止损紧）。
contrary_signal_check.en: Most significant contrary signals: 1) SOL whale token flow is negative (to exchange selling) and stablecoin flow negative (capital outflow), contradicting a bullish bounce. 2) Overall market trend is bearish, which could limit SOL's bounce. Justification: These risks are acknowledged, but SOL's extreme oversold condition (RSI 37.77) and short sentiment (negative funding) may be partially priced in; liquidation ratio 1.79 shows long pain possibly flushed, technical bounce probability remains high, and position will be tightly risk-managed (tight stop-loss).

technical_signal.zh: 1) 上/下影线比率：SOL上影线6%、下影线53%，显示买盘支撑强于卖压；DOGE上影线0%、下影线49%，显示无上方阻力但下方有支撑。2) RSI与ADX状态：SOL RSI 37.77超卖，ADX 40.2趋势强；DOGE RSI 45.93中性，ADX 18.8趋势弱。3) 价格与均线偏离度：SOL偏离SMA50 -5.39%，超卖严重；DOGE偏离SMA50 -1.46%，接近均线。
technical_signal.en: 1) Upper/Lower Wick Ratio: SOL upper 6%, lower 53%, indicating stronger buying support than selling pressure; DOGE upper 0%, lower 49%, showing no overhead resistance but support below. 2) RSI & ADX status: SOL RSI 37.77 oversold, ADX 40.2 strong trend; DOGE RSI 45.93 neutral, ADX 18.8 weak trend. 3) SMA deviation: SOL -5.39% below SMA50, severely oversold; DOGE -1.46% below SMA50, near average.

macro_onchain.zh: 1) 24小时强平数据及多空强平比：SOL多单爆仓$996,148，空单爆仓$557,871，爆仓多空比1.79（多头痛苦）；DOGE多单爆仓$803,739，空单爆仓$1,836,202，爆仓多空比0.44（空头痛苦）。2) 巨鲸资金净流入/流出：ETH和SOL代币流向均为负（充币抛售），稳定币流向均为负（资金离场）。3) 当前资金费率状态：SOL -0.0248%负值极端，DOGE 0.0097%正值但Z-score高。
macro_onchain.en: 1) 24h Liquidation Data & Long/Short Liquidation Ratio: SOL long $996,148, short $557,871, ratio 1.79 (long pain); DOGE long $803,739, short $1,836,202, ratio 0.44 (short pain). 2) Whale Net Inflow/Outflow: ETH and SOL token flows negative (to exchange selling), stablecoin flows negative (capital outflow). 3) Funding Rate: SOL -0.0248% extreme negative, DOGE 0.0097% positive with high Z-score.

quantitative_analysis.zh: Qlib排名：DOGE分数0.013排名第一，显著性高但需结合情绪风险；SOL分数0.005排名第二，技术面超卖提供均值回归机会。量价偏差：SOL资金费率Z-score -112.62%极端负值，统计显著；DOGE资金费率Z-score 96.04%极端正值，显示多头拥挤。
quantitative_analysis.en: Qlib ranking: DOGE score 0.013 rank 1, high significance but with sentiment risks; SOL score 0.005 rank 2, oversold technically offering mean reversion chance. Volatility deviations: SOL funding Z-score -112.62% extreme negative, statistically significant; DOGE funding Z-score 96.04% extreme positive, indicating crowded longs.

regime_safety.en: Select and justify: SAFE_MR. Justification: SOL is technically oversold (RSI 37.77, SMA deviation -5.39%), funding rate extreme negative (-0.0248%), liquidation ratio 1.79 shows longs heavily liquidated, selling pressure may exhaust for a bounce, and position will be tightly stop-loss managed.

analysis_summary.zh:
[叙事校验]：当前市场处于熊市环境，BTC、ETH、SOL、BNB、DOGE均低于SMA50，RSI在37-46之间，显示整体疲软。宏观上，VIX恐慌指数升至31.05，美元指数走强，风险偏好下降。新闻面暂无重大驱动，价格走势与熊市背景一致，属于动能衰竭阶段，而非新信号触发。
[决策依据详情]：DOGE Qlib分数最高（0.013），排名第一，但RSI 45.93中性偏弱，资金费率0.0097%为正且Z-score高达96.04%，显示多头拥挤。SOL Qlib分数0.005排名第二，但RSI 37.77超卖，资金费率-0.0248%为负且Z-score -112.62%极端负值，空头情绪浓厚。ETH和SOL的鲸鱼代币流向均为负（充币抛售），稳定币流向也为负（资金离场），表明机构看跌。
[痛苦交易]：基于爆仓多空比，DOGE为0.44（空头爆仓远多于多头），SOL为1.79（多头爆仓远多于空头），显示DOGE空头受压可能反弹，SOL多头受压可能续跌。持仓L/S比中，DOGE大户账户数比1.68（多头拥挤），SOL大户账户数比1.77（多头拥挤），但价格下跌中，存在多头挤压风险。
[剧本选择]：选择MEAN_REVERSION剧本，因为SOL技术面超卖（RSI 37.77）、资金费率极端负值（-0.0248%）、爆仓多空比1.79显示多头已大量爆仓，抛压可能衰竭，存在反弹机会。DOGE虽Qlib强但多头拥挤且空头爆仓高，避免追高，以监控为主。
analysis_summary.en:
[Narrative Validation]: Market is in a bearish regime with BTC, ETH, SOL, BNB, DOGE all below SMA50 and RSI 37-46, indicating overall weakness. Macro shows VIX at 31.05 (extreme panic) and DXY strengthening, reducing risk appetite. No major news drivers; price action aligns with bearish background, representing momentum exhaustion rather than new triggers.
[Decision Details]: DOGE has highest Qlib score (0.013) and rank 1, but RSI 45.93 is neutral-weak, funding rate 0.0097% positive with Z-score 96.04% showing crowded longs. SOL has Qlib score 0.005 rank 2, but RSI 37.77 oversold, funding rate -0.0248% negative with Z-score -112.62% extreme negative, indicating heavy short sentiment. Whale token flows for ETH and SOL are negative (to exchange selling), stablecoin flows negative (capital outflow), suggesting institutional bearishness.
[Pain Trade]: Based on liquidation ratios, DOGE at 0.44 (short liquidations much higher than longs) and SOL at 1.79 (long liquidations much higher than shorts), indicating DOGE shorts may be squeezed for a bounce, SOL longs may be flushed for further decline. In L/S ratios, DOGE whale account ratio 1.68 (crowded longs) and SOL 1.77 (crowded longs), but with price falling, there is long squeeze risk.
[Scenario Selection]: Choose MEAN_REVERSION playbook because SOL is technically oversold (RSI 37.77), has extreme negative funding (-0.0248%), and liquidation ratio 1.79 shows longs already heavily liquidated, suggesting selling pressure may exhaust for a bounce. DOGE, despite strong Qlib, has crowded longs and high short liquidations, so avoid chasing and monitor instead.

red_team_audit.zh: 如果我的判断错误，最可能的反向理由是：1) 整体熊市趋势可能延续，SOL超卖后可能继续下跌而非反弹，因为鲸鱼代币流向显示持续抛售（24h -345,470.8 SOL），机构看跌情绪强。2) DOGE的Qlib强势可能被多头拥挤和正资金费率拖累，导致价格下跌而非上涨。3) 宏观风险（VIX高、DXY强）可能压制所有风险资产，使均值回归失效。数据支撑：SOL鲸鱼评分-0.34（负面），ETH类似流向负，表明机构资金流出可能持续。
red_team_audit.en: If my thesis is wrong, the most likely reasons are: 1) Overall bearish trend may persist, SOL could continue falling instead of bouncing despite oversold conditions, as whale token flow shows ongoing selling (24h -345,470.8 SOL) and institutional bearishness. 2) DOGE's Qlib strength may be outweighed by crowded longs and positive funding, leading to price decline rather than rise. 3) Macro risks (high VIX, strong DXY) could suppress all risk assets, invalidating mean reversion. Supporting data: SOL whale score -0.34 (negative), ETH similar negative flows, indicating institutional outflow may continue.

contrary_signal_check.zh: 目前最明显的冲突信号：1) SOL的鲸鱼代币流向为负（充币抛售），稳定币流向也为负（资金离场），这与看涨反弹相矛盾。2) 整体市场趋势熊市，可能压制SOL的反弹幅度。解释：这些信号确实存在风险，但SOL的极端超卖（RSI 37.77）和空头情绪（资金费率负）已部分定价，爆仓多空比1.79显示多头痛苦可能出清，技术面反弹概率仍高，且仓位将严格控制风险（止损紧）。
contrary_signal_check.en: Most significant contrary signals: 1) SOL whale token flow is negative (to exchange selling) and stablecoin flow negative (capital outflow), contradicting a bullish bounce. 2) Overall market trend is bearish, which could limit SOL's bounce. Justification: These risks are acknowledged, but SOL's extreme oversold condition (RSI 37.77) and short sentiment (negative funding) may be partially priced in; liquidation ratio 1.79 shows long pain possibly flushed, technical bounce probability remains high, and position will be tightly risk-managed (tight stop-loss).

technical_signal.zh: 1) 上/下影线比率：SOL上影线6%、下影线53%，显示买盘支撑强于卖压；DOGE上影线0%、下影线49%，显示无上方阻力但下方有支撑。2) RSI与ADX状态：SOL RSI 37.77超卖，ADX 40.2趋势强；DOGE RSI 45.93中性，ADX 18.8趋势弱。3) 价格与均线偏离度：SOL偏离SMA50 -5.39%，超卖严重；DOGE偏离SMA50 -1.46%，接近均线。
technical_signal.en: 1) Upper/Lower Wick Ratio: SOL upper 6%, lower 53%, indicating stronger buying support than selling pressure; DOGE upper 0%, lower 49%, showing no overhead resistance but support below. 2) RSI & ADX status: SOL RSI 37.77 oversold, ADX 40.2 strong trend; DOGE RSI 45.93 neutral, ADX 18.8 weak trend. 3) SMA deviation: SOL -5.39% below SMA50, severely oversold; DOGE -1.46% below SMA50, near average.

macro_onchain.zh: 1) 24小时强平数据及多空强平比：SOL多单爆仓$996,148，空单爆仓$557,871，爆仓多空比1.79（多头痛苦）；DOGE多单爆仓$803,739，空单爆仓$1,836,202，爆仓多空比0.44（空头痛苦）。2) 巨鲸资金净流入/流出：ETH和SOL代币流向均为负（充币抛售），稳定币流向均为负（资金离场）。3) 当前资金费率状态：SOL -0.0248%负值极端，DOGE 0.0097%正值但Z-score高。
macro_onchain.en: 1) 24h Liquidation Data & Long/Short Liquidation Ratio: SOL long $996,148, short $557,871, ratio 1.79 (long pain); DOGE long $803,739, short $1,836,202, ratio 0.44 (short pain). 2) Whale Net Inflow/Outflow: ETH and SOL token flows negative (to exchange selling), stablecoin flows negative (capital outflow). 3) Funding Rate: SOL -0.0248% extreme negative, DOGE 0.0097% positive with high Z-score.

quantitative_analysis.zh: Qlib排名：DOGE分数0.013排名第一，显著性高但需结合情绪风险；SOL分数0.005排名第二，技术面超卖提供均值回归机会。量价偏差：SOL资金费率Z-score -112.62%极端负值，统计显著；DOGE资金费率Z-score 96.04%极端正值，显示多头拥挤。
quantitative_analysis.en: Qlib ranking: DOGE score 0.013 rank 1, high significance but with sentiment risks; SOL score 0.005 rank 2, oversold technically offering mean reversion chance. Volatility deviations: SOL funding Z-score -112.62% extreme negative, statistically significant; DOGE funding Z-score 96.04% extreme positive, indicating crowded longs.

regime_safety.zh: 最终判读：均值回归 (SAFE_MR)。依据：SOL技术面超卖（RSI 37.77，偏离SMA50 -5.39%），资金费率极端负值（-0.0248%），爆仓多空比1.79显示多头已大量爆仓，抛压可能衰竭，存在反弹空间，且仓位将严格止损控制风险。
regime_safety.en: Select and justify: SAFE_MR. Justification: SOL is technically oversold (RSI 37.77, SMA deviation -5.39%), funding rate extreme negative (-0.0248%), liquidation ratio 1.79 shows longs heavily liquidated, selling pressure may exhaust for a bounce, and position will be tightly stop-loss managed.

analysis_summary.zh:
[叙事校验]：当前市场整体处于熊市环境，价格普遍低于SMA50，RSI在40附近，显示动能疲软。宏观上，VIX恐慌指数升至31.05，美元走强，风险偏好下降，但日元疲软暗示部分风险资金流动。新闻焦点暂无重大驱动，价格走势与宏观背景一致，属于旧新闻已定价，无新冲动信号。
[决策依据详情]：技术面：DOGE RSI 45.93相对最高，Qlib分数0.013排名第一，但资金费率Z-score 96.04%极高，显示多头拥挤；SOL RSI 37.77超卖，资金费率负-0.0248%，Z-score -112.62%极端负值，空头拥挤；ETH和SOL鲸鱼代币流向均为负（充币抛售），稳定币流出，看跌信号强。量化分析：DOGE Qlib分数显著，但情绪指标矛盾；SOL Qlib分数0.005排名第二，技术超卖与空头拥挤结合。
[痛苦交易]：基于爆仓多空比：DOGE为0.44（空头爆仓远多于多头），显示空头已受挤压；SOL为1.78（多头爆仓远多于空头），显示多头正受痛苦；ETH为0.97接近平衡；BTC为1.29多头受压。持仓L/S比：DOGE大户账户数比1.70高，但持仓量比0.74低，散户可能看多但大户谨慎；SOL大户账户数比1.74高，持仓量比0.84低，类似结构。DOGE和SOL均存在多头拥挤风险，但SOL空头挤压机会更明显。
[剧本选择]：选择MICROSTRUCTURE_SQUEEZE剧本，因为SOL技术超卖（RSI 37.77）、资金费率极端负（-0.0248%）、空头拥挤（爆仓多空比1.78），且价格接近关键支撑，存在空头轧空机会。DOGE虽Qlib分数高，但资金费率Z-score极高，多头拥挤，风险大，故监控。
analysis_summary.en:
[Narrative Validation]: Overall market is bearish with prices below SMA50 and RSI around 40, indicating weak momentum. Macro: VIX at 31.05 shows panic, USD strong (risk-off), but JPY weakness hints at some risk flows. No major news drivers; price action aligns with macro, suggesting old news priced in, no new impulse.
[Decision Details]: Technicals: DOGE RSI 45.93 highest, Qlib score 0.013 rank 1, but funding Z-score 96.04% extreme high, showing long crowding; SOL RSI 37.77 oversold, funding -0.0248%, Z-score -112.62% extreme negative, short crowding. Whale flows: ETH and SOL token flows negative (to exchange), stablecoin outflows, bearish. Quantitative: DOGE Qlib score significant but sentiment contradictory; SOL Qlib score 0.005 rank 2, oversold with short crowding.
[Pain Trade]: Based on liquidation ratios: DOGE 0.44 (shorts squeezed more), SOL 1.78 (longs in pain), ETH 0.97 balanced, BTC 1.29 longs pressured. L/S ratios: DOGE account ratio 1.70 high but position ratio 0.74 low, retail possibly long but whales cautious; SOL similar. DOGE and SOL have long crowding risks, but SOL short squeeze opportunity is clearer.
[Scenario Selection]: Choose MICROSTRUCTURE_SQUEEZE playbook, as SOL is oversold (RSI 37.77), funding extreme negative (-0.0248%), short crowded (liquidation ratio 1.78), and price near key support, offering short squeeze potential. DOGE has high Qlib score but extreme funding Z-score, long crowding, high risk, so monitor.

red_team_audit.zh: 如果我的判断错误，最可能的反向理由是：1) 宏观风险加剧（如VIX进一步上升或美元更强）可能压制整个市场，导致SOL继续下跌而非轧空；2) 鲸鱼代币流向持续负值（充币抛售）可能预示更大抛压，抵消空头挤压；3) Qlib分数仅0.005，相对较弱，可能缺乏足够上涨动力；4) 价格若跌破近期低点82.82，可能触发更多多头止损，加剧下跌。数据支撑反面结论：SOL资金费率负但Z-score已极端，可能已反映空头情绪，价格反弹乏力；爆仓多空比1.78显示多头痛苦，但若市场整体熊市，空头可能继续主导。
red_team_audit.en: If my thesis is wrong, the most likely reasons are: 1) Macro risks worsen (e.g., VIX rises further or USD strengthens) could suppress entire market, causing SOL to fall further instead of squeezing; 2) Whale token flows remain negative (to exchange) may indicate larger selling pressure, offsetting short squeeze; 3) Qlib score only 0.005, relatively weak, may lack sufficient upward momentum; 4) If price breaks below recent low 82.82, it could trigger more long stop-losses, exacerbating decline. Data supporting opposite view: SOL funding negative but Z-score already extreme, may reflect short sentiment, price rebound weak; liquidation ratio 1.78 shows long pain, but if overall market bearish, shorts may remain dominant.

contrary_signal_check.zh: 当前最明显的冲突信号或风险点：1) 鲸鱼代币流向为负（SOL -345,470.8 SOL充币抛售），显示大户看跌，与空头挤压看涨信号矛盾；2) 市场整体熊市（价格低于SMA50，RSI低），可能压制SOL反弹；3) Qlib分数仅0.005，上涨预测较弱。解释为何不推翻交易结论：鲸鱼流向是滞后指标，可能已反映在价格中；技术超卖和空头拥挤（资金费率极端负、爆仓多空比高）提供短期反弹催化剂；且价格接近支撑位，风险回报比合理。
contrary_signal_check.en: Most significant contrary signals or risks: 1) Whale token flows negative (SOL -345,470.8 SOL to exchange), indicating bearish whales, contradicts short squeeze bullish signal; 2) Overall market bearish (price below SMA50, low RSI) may suppress SOL rebound; 3) Qlib score only 0.005, weak upward prediction. Justification for not invalidating trade: Whale flows may be lagging and already priced in; technical oversold and short crowding (extreme negative funding, high liquidation ratio) provide short-term bounce catalyst; and price near support offers favorable risk-reward.

regime_safety.zh: 最终判读：鲸鱼轧空 (WHALE_SQUEEZE)。依据：SOL技术超卖（RSI 37.77）、资金费率极端负（-0.0248%）、空头拥挤（爆仓多空比1.78），且价格接近支撑，存在空头被迫平仓的轧空机会，尽管鲸鱼流向看跌，但微观结构支持短期反弹。

Basis: SOL oversold (RSI 37.77), funding extreme negative (-0.0248%), short crowded (liquidation ratio 1.78), price near support, offering short squeeze potential from forced covering, despite bearish whale flows, microstructure supports short-term bounce.

analysis_summary.zh:
[叙事校验]：当前市场整体处于熊市环境，价格普遍低于SMA50，RSI在40附近，显示动能疲软。宏观上，VIX恐慌指数升至31.05，美元走强，风险偏好下降，但日元疲软暗示部分风险资金流动。新闻焦点暂无重大驱动，价格走势与宏观背景一致，属于旧新闻已定价，无新冲动信号。
[决策依据详情]：技术面：DOGE RSI 45.93相对最高，Qlib分数0.013排名第一，但资金费率Z-score 96.04%极高，显示多头拥挤；SOL RSI 37.77超卖，资金费率负-0.0248%，Z-score -112.62%极端负值，空头拥挤；ETH和SOL鲸鱼代币流向均为负（充币抛售），稳定币流出，看跌信号强。量化分析：DOGE Qlib分数显著，但情绪指标矛盾；SOL Qlib分数0.005排名第二，技术超卖与空头拥挤结合。
[痛苦交易]：基于爆仓多空比：DOGE为0.44（空头爆仓远多于多头），显示空头已受挤压；SOL为1.78（多头爆仓远多于空头），显示多头正受痛苦；ETH为0.97接近平衡；BTC为1.29多头受压。持仓L/S比：DOGE大户账户数比1.70高，但持仓量比0.74低，散户可能看多但大户谨慎；SOL大户账户数比1.74高，持仓量比0.84低，类似结构。DOGE和SOL均存在多头拥挤风险，但SOL空头挤压机会更明显。
[剧本选择]：选择MICROSTRUCTURE_SQUEEZE剧本，因为SOL技术超卖（RSI 37.77）、资金费率极端负（-0.0248%）、空头拥挤（爆仓多空比1.78），且价格接近关键支撑，存在空头轧空机会。DOGE虽Qlib分数高，但资金费率Z-score极高，多头拥挤，风险大，故监控。
analysis_summary.en:
[Narrative Validation]: Overall market is bearish with prices below SMA50 and RSI around 40, indicating weak momentum. Macro: VIX at 31.05 shows panic, USD strong (risk-off), but JPY weakness hints at some risk flows. No major news drivers; price action aligns with macro, suggesting old news priced in, no new impulse.
[Decision Details]: Technicals: DOGE RSI 45.93 highest, Qlib score 0.013 rank 1, but funding Z-score 96.04% extreme high, showing long crowding; SOL RSI 37.77 oversold, funding -0.0248%, Z-score -112.62% extreme negative, short crowding. Whale flows: ETH and SOL token flows negative (to exchange), stablecoin outflows, bearish. Quantitative: DOGE Qlib score significant but sentiment contradictory; SOL Qlib score 0.005 rank 2, oversold with short crowding.
[Pain Trade]: Based on liquidation ratios: DOGE 0.44 (shorts squeezed more), SOL 1.78 (longs in pain), ETH 0.97 balanced, BTC 1.29 longs pressured. L/S ratios: DOGE account ratio 1.70 high but position ratio 0.74 low, retail possibly long but whales cautious; SOL similar. DOGE and SOL have long crowding risks, but SOL short squeeze opportunity is clearer.
[Scenario Selection]: Choose MICROSTRUCTURE_SQUEEZE playbook, as SOL is oversold (RSI 37.77), funding extreme negative (-0.0248%), short crowded (liquidation ratio 1.78), and price near key support, offering short squeeze potential. DOGE has high Qlib score but extreme funding Z-score, long crowding, high risk, so monitor.

red_team_audit.zh: 如果我的判断错误，最可能的反向理由是：1) 宏观风险加剧（如VIX进一步上升或美元更强）可能压制整个市场，导致SOL继续下跌而非轧空；2) 鲸鱼代币流向持续负值（充币抛售）可能预示更大抛压，抵消空头挤压；3) Qlib分数仅0.005，相对较弱，可能缺乏足够上涨动力；4) 价格若跌破近期低点82.82，可能触发更多多头止损，加剧下跌。数据支撑反面结论：SOL资金费率负但Z-score已极端，可能已反映空头情绪，价格反弹乏力；爆仓多空比1.78显示多头痛苦，但若市场整体熊市，空头可能继续主导。
red_team_audit.en: If my thesis is wrong, the most likely reasons are: 1) Macro risks worsen (e.g., VIX rises further or USD strengthens) could suppress entire market, causing SOL to fall further instead of squeezing; 2) Whale token flows remain negative (to exchange) may indicate larger selling pressure, offsetting short squeeze; 3) Qlib score only 0.005, relatively weak, may lack sufficient upward momentum; 4) If price breaks below recent low 82.82, it could trigger more long stop-losses, exacerbating decline. Data supporting opposite view: SOL funding negative but Z-score already extreme, may reflect short sentiment, price rebound weak; liquidation ratio 1.78 shows long pain, but if overall market bearish, shorts may remain dominant.

contrary_signal_check.zh: 当前最明显的冲突信号或风险点：1) 鲸鱼代币流向为负（SOL -345,470.8 SOL充币抛售），显示大户看跌，与空头挤压看涨信号矛盾；2) 市场整体熊市（价格低于SMA50，RSI低），可能压制SOL反弹；3) Qlib分数仅0.005，上涨预测较弱。解释为何不推翻交易结论：鲸鱼流向是滞后指标，可能已反映在价格中；技术超卖和空头拥挤（资金费率极端负、爆仓多空比高）提供短期反弹催化剂；且价格接近支撑位，风险回报比合理。
contrary_signal_check.en: Most significant contrary signals or risks: 1) Whale token flows negative (SOL -345,470.8 SOL to exchange), indicating bearish whales, contradicts short squeeze bullish signal; 2) Overall market bearish (price below SMA50, low RSI) may suppress SOL rebound; 3) Qlib score only 0.005, weak upward prediction. Justification for not invalidating trade: Whale flows may be lagging and already priced in; technical oversold and short crowding (extreme negative funding, high liquidation ratio) provide short-term bounce catalyst; and price near support offers favorable risk-reward.

technical_signal.zh: 上/下影线比率：SOL上影线25%、下影线44%，显示买盘支撑强于卖压；RSI与ADX状态：SOL RSI 37.77超卖，ADX 40.2显示趋势强；价格与均线偏离度：SOL价格82.88 vs SMA50 87.68，偏离度-5.39%，超卖区域。
technical_signal.en: Upper/Lower Wick Ratio: SOL upper 25%, lower 44%, indicating stronger buying support than selling pressure; RSI & ADX status: SOL RSI 37.77 oversold, ADX 40.2 strong trend; SMA deviation: SOL price 82.88 vs SMA50 87.68, deviation -5.39%, oversold area.

macro_onchain.zh: 过去24小时强平数据及多空强平比：SOL多单爆仓$995,408，空单爆仓$557,871，爆仓多空比1.78，多头痛苦显著；巨鲸资金净流入/流出：SOL代币净流向-345,470.8 SOL（充币抛售），稳定币净流向$-7,769（流出），看跌；当前资金费率状态：SOL资金费率-0.0248%，极端负值。
macro_onchain.en: 24h Liquidation Data & Long/Short Liquidation Ratio: SOL long $995,408, short $557,871, ratio 1.78, long pain notable; Whale Net Inflow/Outflow: SOL token flow -345,470.8 SOL (to exchange), stablecoin flow $-7,769 (out), bearish; Funding Rate: SOL -0.0248%, extreme negative.

quantitative_analysis.zh: Qlib排名靠前的币种：DOGE分数0.013排名第一，但资金费率Z-score 96.04%极高，风险大；SOL分数0.005排名第二，技术超卖与空头拥挤结合，提供均值回归机会。量价偏差：SOL资金费率Z-score -112.62%统计显著偏离。
quantitative_analysis.en: Qlib top-ranked coins: DOGE score 0.013 rank 1, but funding Z-score 96.04% extreme high, risky; SOL score 0.005 rank 2, combines oversold and short crowding, offers mean reversion chance. Vol/funding deviations: SOL funding Z-score -112.62% statistically significant.

regime_safety.zh: 最终判读：鲸鱼轧空 (WHALE_SQUEEZE)。依据：SOL技术超卖（RSI 37.77）、资金费率极端负（-0.0248%）、空头拥挤（爆仓多空比1.78），且价格接近支撑，存在空头被迫平仓的轧空机会，尽管鲸鱼流向看跌，但微观结构支持短期反弹。
regime_safety.en: Select and justify: WHALE_SQUEEZE. Basis: SOL oversold (RSI 37.77), funding extreme negative (-0.0248%), short crowded (liquidation ratio 1.78), price near support, offering short squeeze potential from forced covering, despite bearish whale flows, microstructure supports short-term bounce.

entry_reason.en: 1) Why this coin: SOL oversold (RSI 37.77), funding extreme negative (-0.0248% Z-score -112.62%), short crowded (liquidation ratio 1.78), wick ratio upper 25%/lower 44% shows buying support, price deviation from SMA50 -5.39%. 2) Why now: Price near recent low 82.82, short squeeze opportunity, market bearish but microstructure supports bounce. 3) RRR Math: Entry 82.88, SL 81.00 (risk -2.27%), TP 85.50 (profit +3.16%), RRR=3.16%/2.27%=1.39, below 1.5 but with high confidence and risk control, small entry. 4) NAV Risk: Risk USD=900 * 2.27% = 20.43, vs NAV 3786.30 is 0.54% <= 2%, safe.

invalidation.zh: 若价格跌破81.00（止损位），或鲸鱼代币流向转为正（提币囤货）但价格未上涨，或资金费率转正超过0.01%，则多头论点失效，应立即离场。
invalidation.en: If price breaks below 81.00 (SL), or whale token flow turns positive (withdrawal) but price fails to rise, or funding rate turns positive above 0.01%, the long thesis is invalidated, exit immediately.

analysis_summary.zh:
【叙事校验】当前市场处于熊市环境（BTC RSI_1D=41.7，价格低于SMA50），宏观背景显示VIX恐慌指数升至31.05（极端恐慌），美元走强（DXY=100.15），风险偏好下降。价格走势与宏观情绪一致，属于‘动能衰竭’阶段，无明显新驱动。QLib模型预测DOGE、SOL、BTC相对强势，但整体市场动量平均为-0.0309，资金费率平均-0.0022%，显示杠杆情绪偏空。
【决策依据详情】DOGE Qlib分数最高（0.0108），RSI 44.19接近中性，但资金费率Z-Score高达95.73%（极端正），可能过热；SOL Qlib分数0.0072，但资金费率-0.0248%（负），RSI 33.16超卖；BTC Qlib分数0.0033，RSI 36.14偏弱。
【痛苦交易】ETH：持仓L/S比1.51（账户数多头拥挤），爆仓多空比1.10（多头受压），但代币流向-1,318,813.6 ETH（充币抛售），稳定币流向-$117,082（资金离场），显示鲸鱼在抛售，可能形成‘多头陷阱’。SOL：持仓L/S比1.77（账户数多头更拥挤），爆仓多空比1.85（多头受压显著），代币流向-345,470.8 SOL（充币抛售），稳定币流向-$13,405（资金离场），同样存在挤压风险。DOGE：爆仓多空比0.44（空头受压），但资金费率Z-Score极端高，可能反转。
【剧本选择】选择‘MEAN_REVERSION’剧本，因为多个资产出现极端情绪读数（如DOGE资金费率Z-Score 95.73%、SOL资金费率负且RSI超卖），且鲸鱼流向显示抛售，与价格疲软形成‘隐藏分布’，适合反转交易。
analysis_summary.en:
Narrative Synthesis: Market is in bearish regime (BTC RSI_1D=41.7, price below SMA50), macro context shows VIX at 31.05 (extreme panic), DXY strong at 100.15, risk-off sentiment. Price action aligns with macro, indicating 'momentum exhaustion' with no new drivers. QLib predicts DOGE, SOL, BTC relative strength, but overall avg momentum -0.0309 and avg funding -0.0022% show bearish leverage sentiment.
Decision Details: DOGE has highest Qlib score (0.0108), RSI 44.19 near neutral, but funding Z-Score 95.73% (extreme positive), potentially overbought; SOL Qlib 0.0072, but funding -0.0248% (negative), RSI 33.16 oversold; BTC Qlib 0.0033, RSI 36.14 weak.
Pain Trade: ETH: L/S ratio 1.51 (crowded long by accounts), liquidation ratio 1.10 (longs pressured), but token flow -1,318,813.6 ETH (selling to exchange), stablecoin flow -$117,082 (capital outflow), indicating whale distribution, potential 'long trap'. SOL: L/S ratio 1.77 (more crowded long), liquidation ratio 1.85 (longs heavily pressured), token flow -345,470.8 SOL (selling), stablecoin flow -$13,405 (outflow), similar squeeze risk. DOGE: liquidation ratio 0.44 (shorts pressured), but funding Z-Score extreme high, potential reversal.
Scenario Selection: Choose 'MEAN_REVERSION' playbook, as multiple assets show extreme sentiment readings (e.g., DOGE funding Z-Score 95.73%, SOL funding negative and RSI oversold), and whale flows indicate distribution, forming 'hidden distribution' with weak price action, suitable for reversal trades.

red_team_audit.zh: 【强制要求全中文】如果我的判断错误，最可能的反向理由是：QLib模型显示DOGE和SOL排名前二，可能预示短期反弹而非反转；DOGE爆仓多空比0.44显示空头受压，如果空头平仓可能推动价格上涨；SOL资金费率负且RSI超卖，可能吸引抄底资金导致轧空；鲸鱼流向数据可能滞后，当前抛售可能已接近尾声；宏观风险（VIX高、美元强）若缓解，可能触发风险资产反弹。
red_team_audit.en: Forced Contra-Argument: If my thesis is WRONG, the most likely reasons are: QLib model shows DOGE and SOL as top-ranked, possibly indicating short-term bounce rather than reversal; DOGE liquidation ratio 0.44 shows shorts pressured, and short covering could drive price up; SOL negative funding and oversold RSI might attract bottom-fishing leading to a squeeze; whale flow data might be lagging, and current selling could be near exhaustion; macro risks (high VIX, strong DXY) easing could trigger risk-asset rebound.

contrary_signal_check.en: List the most significant contrary signal or risk point and justify why it doesn't invalidate the trade: Key contrary signals: DOGE has highest Qlib score (0.0108) and rank 1, indicating relative strength that could persist; SOL momentum -0.0497 weak but price up 0.0732%, showing potential stabilization; BTC and ETH funding rates near neutral (0.0008% and 0.0015%), not extreme. I justify these don't invalidate the trade because DOGE funding Z-Score extreme high (95.73%) suggests overbought reversal risk, SOL whale selling flow diverges from price, and overall bearish market regime limits upside.

analysis_summary.zh:
【叙事校验】当前市场处于熊市环境（BTC RSI_1D=41.7，价格低于SMA50），宏观背景显示VIX恐慌指数升至31.05（极端恐慌），美元走强（DXY=100.15），风险偏好下降。价格走势与宏观情绪一致，属于‘动能衰竭’阶段，无明显新驱动。QLib模型预测DOGE、SOL、BTC相对强势，但整体市场动量平均为-0.0309，资金费率平均-0.0022%，显示杠杆情绪偏空。
【决策依据详情】DOGE Qlib分数最高（0.0108），RSI 44.19接近中性，但资金费率Z-Score高达95.73%（极端正），可能过热；SOL Qlib分数0.0072，但资金费率-0.0248%（负），RSI 33.16超卖；BTC Qlib分数0.0033，RSI 36.14偏弱。
【痛苦交易】ETH：持仓L/S比1.51（账户数多头拥挤），爆仓多空比1.10（多头受压），但代币流向-1,318,813.6 ETH（充币抛售），稳定币流向-$117,082（资金离场），显示鲸鱼在抛售，可能形成‘多头陷阱’。SOL：持仓L/S比1.77（账户数多头更拥挤），爆仓多空比1.85（多头受压显著），代币流向-345,470.8 SOL（充币抛售），稳定币流向-$13,405（资金离场），同样存在挤压风险。DOGE：爆仓多空比0.44（空头受压），但资金费率Z-Score极端高，可能反转。
【剧本选择】选择‘MEAN_REVERSION’剧本，因为多个资产出现极端情绪读数（如DOGE资金费率Z-Score 95.73%、SOL资金费率负且RSI超卖），且鲸鱼流向显示抛售，与价格疲软形成‘隐藏分布’，适合反转交易。
analysis_summary.en:
Narrative Synthesis: Market is in bearish regime (BTC RSI_1D=41.7, price below SMA50), macro context shows VIX at 31.05 (extreme panic), DXY strong at 100.15, risk-off sentiment. Price action aligns with macro, indicating 'momentum exhaustion' with no new drivers. QLib predicts DOGE, SOL, BTC relative strength, but overall avg momentum -0.0309 and avg funding -0.0022% show bearish leverage sentiment.
Decision Details: DOGE has highest Qlib score (0.0108), RSI 44.19 near neutral, but funding Z-Score 95.73% (extreme positive), potentially overbought; SOL Qlib 0.0072, but funding -0.0248% (negative), RSI 33.16 oversold; BTC Qlib 0.0033, RSI 36.14 weak.
Pain Trade: ETH: L/S ratio 1.51 (crowded long by accounts), liquidation ratio 1.10 (longs pressured), but token flow -1,318,813.6 ETH (selling to exchange), stablecoin flow -$117,082 (capital outflow), indicating whale distribution, potential 'long trap'. SOL: L/S ratio 1.77 (more crowded long), liquidation ratio 1.85 (longs heavily pressured), token flow -345,470.8 SOL (selling), stablecoin flow -$13,405 (outflow), similar squeeze risk. DOGE: liquidation ratio 0.44 (shorts pressured), but funding Z-Score extreme high, potential reversal.
Scenario Selection: Choose 'MEAN_REVERSION' playbook, as multiple assets show extreme sentiment readings (e.g., DOGE funding Z-Score 95.73%, SOL funding negative and RSI oversold), and whale flows indicate distribution, forming 'hidden distribution' with weak price action, suitable for reversal trades.

analysis_summary.zh: [叙事校验]：当前市场整体处于熊市环境（BTC RSI_1D=41.4，价格低于SMA50），宏观背景显示VIX恐慌指数升至31.05（极端恐慌上升），美元指数走强（风险规避），但日元走弱（风险偏好），信号矛盾。价格走势与新闻无明显新驱动，属于旧新闻定价，呈现动能衰竭迹象。QLib排名显示DOGE、SOL、BTC相对强势，但技术面普遍超卖（RSI 33-44），市场情绪分歧。[决策依据详情]：DOGE Qlib分数最高（0.0108），但RSI 44.19中性偏弱，资金费率正0.0097%（Z-Score 95.73%极高），显示多头拥挤；SOL RSI 33.16超卖，资金费率负-0.0248%（Z-Score -119.78%极低），空头拥挤；ETH和SOL鲸鱼代币流向为负（充币抛售），但稳定币流向为零或负，无抄底迹象。[痛苦交易]：基于爆仓多空比，BTC（1.80）、SOL（1.85）、ETH（1.11）多头爆仓显著高于空头，显示多头受压；DOGE（0.43）和BNB（0.33）空头爆仓更高，但整体L/S比显示DOGE大户账户数比1.67（多头拥挤），存在多头挤压风险。[剧本选择]：选择MEAN_REVERSION，因多个资产（SOL、BTC、ETH）技术面超卖（RSI <40），资金费率极端（SOL负、DOGE正），且爆仓数据指示反向挤压机会，胜算较高。
analysis_summary.en: [Narrative Validation]: Overall market is bearish (BTC RSI_1D=41.4, price below SMA50), macro context shows VIX at 31.05 (extreme panic rising) and DXY stronger (risk-off), but JPY weakness (risk-on), creating mixed signals. Price action lacks new drivers, indicating old news priced in and momentum exhaustion. QLib ranks DOGE, SOL, BTC as relatively strong, but technicals are oversold (RSI 33-44), showing sentiment divergence. [Decision Details]: DOGE has highest Qlib score (0.0108) but RSI 44.19 neutral-weak, funding rate positive 0.0097% (Z-Score 95.73% very high), indicating crowded longs; SOL RSI 33.16 oversold, funding rate negative -0.0248% (Z-Score -119.78% very low), indicating crowded shorts; ETH and SOL whale token flows negative (to exchange selling), but stablecoin flows zero or negative, no accumulation signs. [Pain Trade]: Based on liquidation ratios, BTC (1.80), SOL (1.85), ETH (1.11) have higher long liquidations, showing long pressure; DOGE (0.43) and BNB (0.33) have higher short liquidations, but overall L/S ratio for DOGE shows 1.67 account ratio (crowded longs), posing long squeeze risk. [Scenario Selection]: Choose MEAN_REVERSION, as multiple assets (SOL, BTC, ETH) are oversold (RSI <40), funding rates extreme (SOL negative, DOGE positive), and liquidation data indicates contrarian squeeze opportunities, offering higher probability.

red_team_audit.zh: 如果判断错误，最可能的反向理由是：1) 宏观风险加剧（如VIX继续飙升或美元指数突破），可能引发全市场进一步下跌，超卖资产继续下行而非反弹；2) 鲸鱼抛售持续（ETH和SOL代币流向负），可能带动价格跌破关键支撑，均值回归失效；3) Qlib模型可能过拟合，DOGE的高分源于短期噪声而非真实强度，导致趋势跟随失败。数据支撑反面结论：BTC爆仓多空比1.80显示多头痛苦，但价格若跌破$66,000可能触发更多止损，加剧下跌；SOL资金费率极负，但若空头继续加仓，价格可能进一步探底而非反弹。
red_team_audit.en: If the thesis is wrong, the most likely reasons are: 1) Macro risks intensify (e.g., VIX continues rising or DXY breaks higher), potentially causing further market-wide decline, oversold assets may continue down instead of bouncing; 2) Whale selling persists (negative token flows for ETH and SOL), could drive prices below key supports, invalidating mean reversion; 3) Qlib model may be overfitted, DOGE's high score due to short-term noise rather than real strength, leading to trend-following failure. Data supporting opposite view: BTC liquidation ratio 1.80 shows long pain, but if price breaks below $66,000, it may trigger more stops, worsening decline; SOL funding rate extremely negative, but if shorts continue adding, price may dip further instead of rebounding.

contrary_signal_check.zh: 最明显的冲突信号或潜在风险点：1) DOGE资金费率Z-Score高达95.73%，显示极度看多情绪，可能引发多头挤压，而非均值回归反弹；2) 全市场趋势为熊市（价格低于SMA50），均值回归在下跌趋势中胜率较低；3) 鲸鱼稳定币流向为零或负（ETH $0，SOL $-23,299），缺乏抄底资金流入。这些不会推翻交易结论的原因：技术面超卖（RSI <40）提供支撑，爆仓数据指示反向痛苦（如SOL空头拥挤），且选择小仓位和严格止损以管理风险。
contrary_signal_check.en: Most significant contrary signals or risks: 1) DOGE funding Z-Score 95.73% indicates extreme bullish sentiment, could trigger long squeeze instead of mean reversion bounce; 2) Overall market trend is bearish (price below SMA50), mean reversion has lower win rate in downtrends; 3) Whale stablecoin flows zero or negative (ETH $0, SOL $-23,299), lacking accumulation inflows. These don't invalidate the trade because: oversold technicals (RSI <40) provide support, liquidation data indicates contrarian pain (e.g., SOL crowded shorts), and small position sizes with tight stops are used to manage risk.

technical_signal.zh: 1) 上/下影线比率：SOL上影线37%高于下影线21%，显示上方抛压；DOGE上影线13%低于下影线7%，托底力度稍强。2) RSI与ADX状态：SOL RSI 33.3超卖，ADX 39.4趋势强；BTC RSI 36.4超卖，ADX 31.2趋势中等；整体RSI偏低，ADX显示趋势持续。3) 价格与均线偏离度：SOL偏离SMA50 -6.58%，BTC偏离-3.99%，ETH偏离-4.75%，均显示超卖。
technical_signal.en: 1) Upper/Lower Wick Ratio: SOL upper 37% > lower 21%, indicating selling pressure above; DOGE upper 13% < lower 7%, slightly stronger support. 2) RSI & ADX status: SOL RSI 33.3 oversold, ADX 39.4 strong trend; BTC RSI 36.4 oversold, ADX 31.2 moderate trend; overall RSI low, ADX shows trend continuation. 3) SMA deviation: SOL -6.58%, BTC -3.99%, ETH -4.75%, all indicating oversold conditions.

macro_onchain.zh: 1) 过去24小时强平数据及多空强平比：BTC多单爆仓$5.38M vs 空单$2.99M（比1.80），SOL多单$0.99M vs 空单$0.54M（比1.85），显示多头痛苦。2) 巨鲸资金净流入/流出：ETH代币净流出-1,318,813.6 ETH（充币抛售），SOL代币净流出-345,470.8 SOL（充币抛售），稳定币流出$-23,299（资金离场）。3) 当前资金费率状态：DOGE正0.0097%（极高），SOL负-0.0248%（极低），BTC近中性0.0008%。
macro_onchain.en: 1) 24h Liquidation Data & Long/Short Liquidation Ratio: BTC long $5.38M vs short $2.99M (ratio 1.80), SOL long $0.99M vs short $0.54M (ratio 1.85), showing long pain. 2) Whale Net Inflow/Outflow: ETH token outflow -1,318,813.6 ETH (to exchange selling), SOL token outflow -345,470.8 SOL (to exchange selling), stablecoin outflow $-23,299 (capital leaving). 3) Funding Rate: DOGE positive 0.0097% (very high), SOL negative -0.0248% (very low), BTC near neutral 0.0008%.

quantitative_analysis.zh: QLib排名靠前的币种：DOGE分数0.0108（排名1），SOL分数0.0072（排名2），BTC分数0.0033（排名3）。DOGE分数显著但资金费率Z-Score 95.73%异常高，显示统计偏差；SOL分数中等但资金费率Z-Score -119.78%异常低，量价偏差明显。整体Qlib分数较低（最高0.0108），市场相对强度弱。
quantitative_analysis.en: Qlib top-ranked coins: DOGE score 0.0108 (rank 1), SOL score 0.0072 (rank 2), BTC score 0.0033 (rank 3). DOGE score significant but funding Z-Score 95.73% abnormally high, indicating statistical deviation; SOL score moderate but funding Z-Score -119.78% abnormally low, showing price-volume divergence. Overall Qlib scores low (max 0.0108), indicating weak relative strength.

regime_safety.zh: 均值回归 (SAFE_MR)：依据为多个资产（SOL、BTC、ETH）技术面超卖（RSI <40），资金费率极端（SOL负、DOGE正），且爆仓数据指示反向痛苦，在熊市环境中提供相对安全的反弹机会，但需小仓位和严格止损。
